  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_648_0": "\\E8* ..^1.而且她跟兰瑟\n非常合得来！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_654_0": "* 喂^1，你们没有乱动我的\n藏身处吧？/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_656_0": "* 你管它叫“藏身处”^1，\n是不是有点夸张了？/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_658_0": "* 有吗^1？我刚刚在里头打了个盹^1，\n所以它就是我的房子了！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_540_0": "* ...！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_544_0": "* ...！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_547_0": "* ...？\n* 你是怎么知道它在那里的^1，\n克里斯？/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_548_0": "\\E6* 克里斯..^1. 你知道吗^1？\n你真是太不可思议了。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_559_0": "* （树上没有其他令人在意的东西了。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_564_0": "* （有棵树拦住了去路。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_565_0": "* （乍一看你好像可以绕过它^1，\n但其实根本不行。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_511_0": "* 不-不知为何^1，兰瑟王子交的\n真心朋友是一位光之民.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_512_0": "* 得-得有人快点禀报国王^1，\n越快越好...！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_513_0": "* ..^1.不过^1，这事儿我可坚决不干。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_514_0": "* 负责传达坏消息的人下场总会很惨！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_515_0": "* 别盯着我看了！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_519_0": "* 呃啊^1！我好嫉妒有叶子的人啊！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_527_0": "* 我们设计好的揍人机哪去了？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_529_0": "* 你说什么机？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_531_0": "* 就是那个机器啊...？\n* 我们花了心思设计出来的...？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_533_0": "* 哦^1，那个啊。\n* 嗯^1，我们迟早会做的。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_535_0": "* 你们两个还是早点把它\n做完为好.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_537_0": "* 你是在教我做事吗？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_538_0": "\\E2* 我来这儿可不是为了\n再找一个爸爸的！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_540_0": "* 呵呵呵^1，没错^1，说的好！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_547_0": "* 当个坏蛋还真是惬意啊！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_549_0": "* 克里斯^1，要是嫉妒的话^1，\n你也可以当个坏蛋啊.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_551_0": "* 你们这种到处使坏的生活方式^1，\n克里斯才没有嫉妒呢...！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_552_0": "\\E6* （不过^1，如果真是这样^1，\n我也可以找片漂亮的叶子\n替你扇风...）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_560_0": "* 那么^1，苏西^1，呃..^1. \n差不多该回来当好人了吧？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_562_0": "* 没门^1。当个坏蛋可太爽了。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_563_0": "\\E2* 不仅比当个“好人”\n要有意思得多，/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_564_0": "* 还会有队友夸奖我的所作所为。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_566_0": "* 刚才啊^1，苏西从地上\n叼了个松果吃。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_567_0": "* 结果她的肚子疼得死去活来的。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_568_0": "\\E3* 这真是既勇敢又酷炫。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_570_0": "* 瞧见没？？^1？\n终于有点最起码的尊重了！！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_577_0": "* 喂^1，让开^1，牙膏小队长。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_578_0": "* 你挡着我晒影光浴了。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_580_0": "* 暗影的耀斑能使我们的皮肤\n苍白得晃瞎你的眼！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_128_0": "* 光..^1. 光之民！\n* 这个女孩是你带来的^1，\n对-对不对！？/",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_129_0": "* 她-她逼着我替她扇扇子...^1！\n求你管管她吧！/",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_131_0": "* 没有的事^1，他们实际上是\n我的敌人。/",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_132_0": "\\E4* 就是因为我太邪恶了\n我们才散伙了。/",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_134_0": "* 啊！^1？救命！！^1！救救我啊！！\n* 我不想这么永远扇下去！！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_137_0": "* 救救我啊！！^1！\n我不想这么永远扇下去！！！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_141_0": "* 我原以为自己讨厌扇叶^1，\n结果没想到我还挺享受它的.../",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_142_0": "* （扇^1，扇）\n* 我可以一直扇个不停！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_109_0": "* 呃呃呃啊^1，为什么国王非得逼着我们\n照顾他的儿子？/",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_110_0": "* 虽说他不是个坏小孩^1，\n可他性格确实很古怪^1，\n而我们..^1. 没法违抗命令.../",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_111_0": "* ..^1.所以没有人真心喜欢他\n也是很正常的。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_114_0": "* 但-但是^1，话又说回来^1，\n正因为没有人愿意和他交朋友.../",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_115_0": "* 才导致他和光之民成为真心朋友..^1. \n还是个脾气刻薄的.../",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_116_0": "* 早知如此我们该多引导他的^1，唉！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_121_0": "* （扇^1，扇）\n* 噢^1，扇扇子？\n* 我不是在扇扇子。/",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_122_0": "* 这片叶子上有配重^1。\n我只不过是在锻炼肌肉。/%",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_437_0": "* 顺便一说^1，去森林迷宫的话\n可要多留点神。/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_439_0": "* 你们很可能会彻底迷路的.../",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_440_0": "\\E2* 除非有人对这里了如指掌。/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_442_0": "* 没错^1！这森林对我来说就跟\n自己的后脑勺一样熟悉！/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_541_0": "* 那接下来咱们该走\n哪条路啊？？？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_543_0": "* 我们刚才..^1. 一直跟着你走。/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_545_0": "* 啊..^1. 为什么^1？\n我根本不认识路！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_547_0": "* （..^1.克里斯^1，我们还是..^1.\n走兰瑟不走的路吧？？？）/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_550_0": "* 我刚才一直反跟着你们走。/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_552_0": "* 虽然我..^1. 不太明白是什么意思^1，\n不过也好吧。/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_557_0": "* 哈哈哈^1，又回来啦！？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_559_0": "* （克里斯^1，我们别跟着兰瑟\n走了^1，好吗？）/%",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_461_0": "* 嘿^1，俩废物！/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_462_0": "\\E0* 等一下^1。兰瑟怎么不见了？/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_464_0": "* 呃^1，这个嘛^1，他没找对路^1，\n结果.../",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_466_0": "* 你就让他一个人瞎转悠去了！？/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_467_0": "\\E0* 你也知道他很不擅长走迷宫^1，\n对不对！？/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_468_0": "\\E9* 他很可能正因为迷路而着急呢！/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_470_0": "* 吼吼吼！！^1！\n我正因为迷路而着急呢！/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_472_0": "* 抱歉^1，苏西..^1.\n我们不是有意让你替他担心的。/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_474_0": "* 啊...^1？听好了^1，我才没有^1，\n呃^1，替他担心！/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_475_0": "\\E2* 坏蛋之间也得相互照应^1，\n仅此而已。/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_476_0": "\\E0* 总之^1，别挡我的路^1！\n我得去找他了！/%",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_497_0": "* （看来她也不知道正确的路^1，\n克里斯...）/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_568_0": "* 该死^1，\n他明明是沿着这条路走的.../",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_570_0": "* 你还在搜救\n迷路的兰瑟吗...？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_572_0": "* 才没有^1，\n他能照顾好自己的小命的。/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_573_0": "\\E6* 只不过^1，呃^1，你们要是看见他了\n就跟我说一声.../",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_575_0": "* （克里斯^1，我们还是走苏西\n和兰瑟不走的路吧...）/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_576_0": "\\E6* （等我们走出去之后再想办法\n帮他们也不迟！）/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_579_0": "* 在看什么呢？/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_584_0": "* 他刚才不是走了这条路吗...？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_586_0": "* （克里斯^1，我们就不要\n跟着兰瑟和苏西走了^1，\n好吗？）/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_56_0": "* 克..^1. 克里斯^1！那不是\n我们设计的\\cY机器\\cW吗...！？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_57_0": "\\EA* 好吧^1！这将是一场硬仗^1，\n但我们也会全力以赴！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_93_0": "* 噢。\n* 还挺..^1. 不怎么样的^1，\n说实话。/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_62_0": "* ..^1.这是不是我想的那个东西？/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_68_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_97_0": "* ..^1.是啊^1。猜对了。/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_233_0": "* 你干嘛要为了炸掉它\n特地又做了一台啊？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_235_0": "* 这很搞笑啊！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_237_0": "* 好吧^1，不管怎么说^1，\n你击败了我们.../",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_238_0": "\\E6* 我想我们现在是坏蛋了！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_240_0": "* 嘿^1，别太快下结论！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_242_0": "* 如果你们现在放弃的话\n那可就太没意思了！！！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_243_0": "\\E2* 你们至少尝试反抗一下呀！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_245_0": "* 看起来我们该给你们\n上堂课了！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_302_0": "* 你又要揍扁我们了吗！？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_304_0": "* 看样子是的。/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_102_0": "* ..^1. 这玩意儿他们到底\n还有多少？/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_148_0": "* 吼吼吼^1！你们觉得这就够糟了^1？\n等着瞧吧！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_149_0": "\\E9* ..^1.启动后会让你大吃一惊！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_210_0": "* 你们的设计逊爆了^1，\n所以我们把它炸了。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_212_0": "* 这样啊^1。我知道了。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_213_0": "\\E6* ..^1. 那么..^1. \n你们现在的计划是什么？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_215_0": "* 到头来^1，我们发现\n并不需要什么计划^1。\n只要一条规则就够了。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_217_0": "* 任何碍我们事的家伙.../",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_219_0": "* 都要往死里揍。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_221_0": "* 可是苏西^1，\n你需要我们才能回家啊。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_222_0": "\\E6* 揍扁我们不会显得\n有点适得其反吗？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_224_0": "* 不^1，看吧^1，\n你错就错在这里。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_225_0": "\\E0* 我知道^1，没了你们我回不了家。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_226_0": "\\E1* 但是做个^1，呵，“好人”\n真的不是我的风格。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_227_0": "\\E2* 所以^1，我想到了一个小办法..^1.\n可以解决这个问题。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3001_0": "* 只要你们能打败我^1，\n我就回去当个好人。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3002_0": "\\E0* 但如果你们输了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3003_0": "\\E2* 你们就要跟我们一起当坏蛋.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3004_0": "\\E4* ..^1.并且对我们言听计从。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3006_0": "* 吼吼吼！^1！\n我们的话就是命令！ ！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3009_0": "\\E1* 那么^1，你们咋看...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_371_0": "\\C2",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2997_0": "\n来战斗吧",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2998_0": "\n还是算了",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3014_0": "* 呃^1，没必要回答了。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3015_0": "\\E2* 反正我们都要揍扁你们的^1，\n所以.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3016_0": "\\E3* 拜拜了！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_252_0": "* 拜托就让我们当坏蛋吧。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_254_0": "* 才不同意呢！！！\n* 除非你们不愿意当坏蛋了！！！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_256_0": "* 行吧！！^1！我们不当坏蛋了！！！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_258_0": "* 你听见了吗^1，苏西？？？/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_312_0": "* 看来我们必须逼你当个坏蛋了。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_314_0": "* 可这完全没必要啊。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_316_0": "* 我就喜欢这句话！！！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_712_0": "* 克里斯^1，我们离喷泉\n越来越近了.../",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_713_0": "\\E8* 我们还是别走回头路了。/%",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_463_0": "* 两个坏蛋拦住了去路！",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_346_0": "兰瑟",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_263_0": "查看",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_527_0": "想点办法",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_530_0": "X-想点办法",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_538_0": "苏西",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_294_0": "查看",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_553_0": "想点办法",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_556_0": "唱歌",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0": "* 苏西 - 攻击:~1 防御:~2 HP:~3\n* 你装备给她的防具让她更结实了！/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_159_0": "* 苏西 - 攻击:~1 防御:~2 HP:~3\n* 如果你看过状态面板^1，\n你早就知道这些了。/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_59_0": "这辆自行车的\n燃料是邪恶！\n..^1.和友谊！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_19_0": "呵呵^1，\n怕了没？",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_56_0": "嘿！^1！\n嘿苏西！^1！\n看我^1，\n快看我！！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_20_0": "看你们\n怎么躲得开\n这招！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_57_0": "准备挨揍吧^1，\n你们这群\n哈密瓜！！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_21_0": "看你们光动嘴\n怎么躲得开\n这招！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_22_0": "脑筋转快些！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_58_0": "恐惧^1！痛苦^1！\n真正的坏蛋\n才有的力量！\n（不错吧？）",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_82_0": "* 苏西和兰瑟在思考如何庆祝胜利。",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_79_0": "* 苏西和兰瑟在取笑你们。",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_80_0": "* 苏西和兰瑟在为他们的完美组队\n而洋洋得意。",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_81_0": "* 苏西和兰瑟在比谁的笑声更邪恶。",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0": "* 闻起来像团队合作。",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_170_0": "* 你试图说服苏西不要战斗。/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_171_0": "* 你试图告诉苏西你喜欢她的头发。/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_172_0": "* 你像头熊一样向苏西低吼。/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_173_0": "* 你告诉苏西你会给她满满\n一野餐篮的蠕虫。/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_174_0": "* 你已经不知道该拿苏西怎么办了。/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_175_0": "* 完全没效果！/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_176_0": "* 看来这条指令完全是在浪费时间！/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_35_0": "没门^1！\n闭上嘴\n来战斗！！！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_36_0": "真的吗？\n..^1.\n闭上嘴\n来战斗！！！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_37_0": "你们到底\n在干嘛？",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_38_0": "真的吗...^1？\n不可能^1，\n我什么都\n没看见！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_39_0": "是啊^1，\n毫无希望。",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_70_0": "噢！！^1！\n这对我\n很有效！！！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_78_0": "真的吗！^1？\n这很糟诶！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_73_0": "嘻嘻嘻^1！\n我无知\n我幸福！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_176_0": "* 你试图说服兰瑟不要战斗。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_177_0": "* 兰瑟有点被说服了！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_187_0": "* 你告诉兰瑟你会给他满满\n一野餐篮的蠕虫。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_188_0": "* 兰瑟快被完全说服了！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_193_0": "* 你告诉兰瑟你只想和睦相处！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_194_0": "* 决定性的友善一击！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_197_0": "* 你告诉兰瑟\n你想超快地和睦相处！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_198_0": "* 声波瞬间就传达到兰瑟那里了！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_230_0": "* 你告诉利艾尔斯用逻辑击败\n兰瑟和苏西。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_232_0": "* 你们两个^1，如果我们继续\n战斗下去.../",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_233_0": "\\E6* ..^1.可能会有人受伤的！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_235_0": "* （兰瑟又被说服了一点^1！\n起作用了！）/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_256_0": "* 你让利艾尔斯超快地称赞兰瑟！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_258_0": "* 你这人真是超棒超酷炫\n你造吗？！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_260_0": "* 声波瞬间就传达到兰瑟那里了！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_314_0": "* （但是在声波传达到兰瑟那儿\n前被苏西拦住了！）/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_316_0": "* 想说服听不见你说话的人\n就尽管试试！/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_43_0": "拍马屁\n对我们\n是没用\n的！！！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_44_0": "要的\n就是\n受伤！！！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_72_0": "真的吗！^1？\n我刚好\n想要\n那个！！！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_45_0": "真的...^1？\n我是说..^1.\n不需要！！！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_80_0": "嘻嘻嘻^1！\n我无知\n我幸福！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_46_0": "哈^1，坏蛋们\n得分！！！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_283_0": "* （【安抚】法术被兰瑟的自行车\n吸收了！）/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_285_0": "* 我绝不会让你们【饶恕】我的\n朋友的！！！/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_287_0": "* （兰瑟的自行车开始疲惫了？？）/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_290_0": "* （【安抚】法术被兰瑟的自行车\n吸收了！）/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_291_0": "* （疲惫的自行车轮被【饶恕】了！）/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_292_0": "* （它变成了惫胎！）/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_293_0": "* （..^1.虽然并没有起什么作用。）/",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_294_0": "* （看起来【安抚】并不会起作用！）/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_298_0": "* （【安抚】法术被兰瑟的自行车\n吸收了！）/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_67_0": "别担心车车^1，\n我一会儿就\n送你去被窝\n睡觉觉...",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_145_0": "* 兰瑟正要把它骑走。",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_299_0": "* （看来没什么趣事会发生了！）/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_146_0": "* 兰瑟在想着薯片。",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0": "* 兰瑟的摩托车其实只是辆\n着了火的自行车。",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_148_0": "* 兰瑟随机地切换挡位^1，\n想显示自己的技术。",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_149_0": "* 兰瑟猛烈地旋转引擎。",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_167_0": "* 兰瑟 - 攻击 7 防御 1\n* 小心！！^1！他被友谊强化了！/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_28_0": "喂^1，别再跟他\n套近乎了！",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_31_0": "喂^1，\n别再打他了！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_64_0": "嗷^1，我的\n肚子好疼！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_66_0": "喔^1，多么美妙\n的歌曲！！！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_348_0": "* 嗷.../",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_350_0": "* 嘿^1，嘿！^1！已经够了！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_351_0": "* 如果你继续打他^1，可能会真的\n伤到他的！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_352_0": "\\E0* ..^1.兰瑟^1，你还好吗...？/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_354_0": "* 我..^1. 我没事^1，苏西！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_355_0": "\\E7* 不过我的五脏六腑..^1. \n感觉像搅在一起了。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_357_0": "* 行了^1，行了^1！你们赢了！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_359_0": "* （克里斯^1，也许我们\n刚才应该下手轻点...）/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_197_0": "* 利艾尔斯唱了一首\n舒缓又安神的摇篮曲！/%",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_223_0": "* 苏西睡着了！/%",

  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_228_0": "（睡着）",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Draw_0_gml_5_0": "（清醒）",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_48_0": "（呼噜噜...）",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_49_0": "（哈欠）\n我醒了^1，\n有没有\n错过什么？",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Other_11_gml_9_0": "（清醒）",
  "obj_susieenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_118_0": "好了好了^1，\n你们说服我了！！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_222_0": "* 你让利艾尔斯去称赞敌人！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_224_0": "* 你们两个真是个超棒的小队！\n* 我为你们感到骄傲！/",

  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_77_0": "噢！！^1！\n这对我\n很有效！！！",

  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_71_0": "谢谢^1，\n这是\n天生的！",

  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_245_0": "* （兰瑟快被完全说服了！）/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_79_0": "哇哦^1，那我\n看起来一定\n棒极了！！",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_250_0": "* 你让利艾尔斯发动最后的\n友善一击！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_252_0": "* 总的来说^1，我喜欢你们两位.../",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_253_0": "\\E8* 我觉得我们肯定能和睦相处！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_363_0": "* 啊哦。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_365_0": "* 怎么了^1，哥们？/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_367_0": "* 我不小心开始喜欢上\n敌人们了...！/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_368_0": "\\E3* 现在看到他们会让我\n心里软绵绵的。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_369_0": "\\E4* 气氛不适合战斗啦。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_371_0": "* .../",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_372_0": "\\E1* 好吧^1，既然你不想战斗的话，/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_373_0": "\\E0* 那看来就没什么必要了。/",
  "obj_lancerboss3_slash_Step_0_gml_374_0": "\\E2* 战斗结束！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_461_0": "* 你们并没有打赢我们^1，\n因为你们^1，呃.../",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_462_0": "* 耍了花招^1，呃^1，\n靠那啥拉拢了兰瑟.../",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_464_0": "* 靠友善。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_466_0": "* 但是^1，如果非得这样的话^1，\n我还是会回到你们那边去的。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_456_0": "\\E4* 不过别指望我除了战斗以外\n还会干别的。/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_489_0": "* 那么^1，你能回到我们身边^1，\n我们很高兴^1，苏西。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_491_0": "* 行了^1，行了^1，我们赶紧回家吧。/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_454_0": "* 好啦^1，好啦^1，够了！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_455_0": "\\E1* 那好吧..^1.\n我就回去做个好人吧。/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_467_0": "\\E4* 不过别指望我除了战斗以外\n还会干别的。/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_509_0": "* .../",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_510_0": "\\E7* 呃..^1. 苏西？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_511_0": "\\E4* 这是不是意味着..^1. \n我们不再是队友了？/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_535_0": "* 啊...^1？\n呃^1，我是说.../%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_551_0": "* 我们当然还是队友了！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_552_0": "\\E2* 你可以^1，呃.../%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_573_0": "* ..^1. 成为~1\n的一员！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_568_0": "伙计们",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_569_0": "$！$^1？小队",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_570_0": "兰瑟粉丝俱乐部",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_571_0": "快乐帮",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_575_0": "* 哇哦^1！我嘛...！^1？\n加入~1！？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_576_0": "\\E7* 等等.../%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_586_0": "* 如果我跟好人们走在一起^1，\n那么.../%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_595_0": "* 我们还能穿绣了名字的\n运动外套吗？/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_597_0": "* 能啊！\n* 利艾尔斯会帮我们做的！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_599_0": "* 啊...？！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_600_0": "\\E8* ..^1.那好吧！/",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_602_0": "* 啊哈哈哈！！\n* 兰瑟加入了队伍！！！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_615_0": "* 兰瑟加入了队伍！/%",
  "obj_susieandlancer_event_slash_Step_0_gml_629_0": "* 不了解。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_591_0": "* 你可以跟在我们后面走^1，\n你知道吧。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_593_0": "* 噢^1，好的！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_597_0": "* ..^1.我注意到你并没有这么做。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_599_0": "* 对！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_54_0": "* 哇^1，这可真酷！！！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_55_0": "\\E6* 我以前从来没有加入过\n这么庞大的队伍！！！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_57_0": "* 你不是有一个..^1. 由各种家伙\n组成的军团吗？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_59_0": "* 没错^1，但那是我爸爸\n逼他们听我的。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_60_0": "\\E4* 所以他们并不怎么待见我。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_62_0": "* 呵^1，那你再也不需要\n那帮小鬼了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_63_0": "\\E2* 和我们一起耍就好了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_65_0": "* 好呀好呀！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_77_0": "* 天哪^1，我肚子还是好饿。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_78_0": "\\E0* 感觉我在这里无论吃什么\n都像没吃一样。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_79_0": "\\E2* 早知道就该为了烘焙特卖\n多偷一点钱。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_81_0": "* ..^1. 其实我考虑过\n之后要做个蛋糕的哦。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0": "* 唔..^1. 你什么意思。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_85_0": "* ..^1. 想吃蛋糕的话^1，\n就别再拿我开玩笑了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_87_0": "* 要不起！！！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_102_0": "* ..^1. I WAS thinking of making Darkberry Teacakes later./",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_104_0": "* Mmmmm..^1. what's the catch./",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0": "* ..^1. you have to stop making fun of me, for one./",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0": "* PASS!!!/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_129_0": "* 快看^1，苏西！\n* 是一棵糖果树！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_131_0": "* 棒极了！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_545_0": "* ..^1.可恶^1，\n最后一颗太高了拿不到。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_547_0": "* 不用担心^1，苏西！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_548_0": "\\E2* 为了应付这种情况^1，\n我有一个\\cY特殊形态\\cW！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_550_0": "* 真-真的吗！？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_552_0": "* 好好看好好学^1，队友们！！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_608_0": "* 瞧！\\cY板凳形态\\cW！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_610_0": "* ..^1.你就只是把手\n撑在地面上而已。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_612_0": "* 嘿^1，别这么酸嘛。/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_723_0": "* 呵呵呵^1，拿到了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_725_0": "* 哦哦哦^1，告诉我它尝起来\n什么味道！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_742_0": "* 啊^1？你以前从来没吃过？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_744_0": "* 噢..^1. 我是说^1，我一直想知道\n它是什么味道的.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_745_0": "\\E4* 但爸爸不准我自己摘了吃.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_279_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_771_0": "* 好吧^1，那你来告诉我它尝起来\n什么味道。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_773_0": "* 你打算把它给我...？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_774_0": "\\E6* 我还以为你正饿着呢。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_803_0": "* ..^1.我^1，呃^1，改主意了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_805_0": "* 吼吼！！！\n* 糖果加入了队伍！！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_817_0": "* 糖果加入了队伍！      %%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_839_0": "* 够了别再来了！！！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_151_0": "* ..^1.那么它尝起来什么味道？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_153_0": "* 咂咂咂^1！友谊的味道！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_155_0": "* 那是什么味道？？？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_157_0": "* 哈哈哈！^1！\n感觉我的牙齿快要散架了！！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_393_0": "* 哈哈^1，那.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_394_0": "\\E6* 那其实..^1. 不是好事。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_396_0": "* 哈哈^1，对^1！\n但谢谢你愿意分享！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_397_0": "\\E3* 你真是我的好朋友！！！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_399_0": "* 好吧^1，呃.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_400_0": "\\E1* ..^1.你也一样^1，大概吧。/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_187_0": "* 只是和你们一起散步... \n* 就感觉很棒了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_188_0": "\\E7* 就好像我在做着一件..^1.\n重要的事。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_190_0": "* 那是因为你正和光之民们\n一同行动^1，兰瑟。/",

  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_192_0": "\\E6* 只有这样^1，\n我们才能感到真正的满足。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_194_0": "* 真的吗...？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_195_0": "\\E4* ..^1.但我的爸爸憎恨光之民^1。\n他想要.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_197_0": "* 你的爸爸看起来快乐吗？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_199_0": "* ..^1.我..^1.不确定。/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_213_0": "* 嘿^1，呃^1，我们先别谈这些\n奇怪的“意义”了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_214_0": "* 你大概只是因为吃了个奇怪的\n果子而感到高兴。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_216_0": "* 对^1！它的汁液还在让我兴奋！！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_218_0": "* 尽管我并不是这个世界的人^1，\n但像这样与你们一起闲逛.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_219_0": "\\E6* 我还感觉挺那啥^1，\n呃^1，你懂的.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_221_0": "* ..^1.开心？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_223_0": "* 切^1，不。/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_236_0": "* ..^1.大概吧。/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_265_0": "* 大家^1，快看！\n* 我们可以看到城堡了！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_267_0": "* 对^1！那就是我住的地方！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_268_0": "\\E3* 我和^1，呃.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_269_0": "\\E6* 我的..^1. 爸爸。/",

  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_273_0": "* 那就是喷泉^1，苏西^1！\n只要我们到达那里.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_274_0": "\\E8* 你和克里斯就可以回家了！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_276_0": "* 哎哟^1，总算要结束了。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_277_0": "\\E2* 克里斯^1，兰瑟^1，\n我们走吧！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_313_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_303_0": "* 你们确定..^1. \n没有别的方法可以回家吗？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_304_0": "* 喷泉现在正在戒严。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_305_0": "* 如果你们想去那里^1，唔.../",

  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_308_0": "* 你说什么^1？\n拜托^1，兰瑟。/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_309_0": "\\E2* 没人能打败像我们这样的\n一支队伍！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_310_0": "\\E0* 如果有谁挡了咱们的道^1，\n咱们要做的.../",

  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_747_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_932_0": "* ..^1.可如果你们不得不迎战.../",

  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_935_0": "\\E4* 不管是谁挡在我们前头^1，都会在\n眨眼间变成地上冰冷的尸体。/",

  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_939_0": "* 怎么了？/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_941_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_962_0": "\\EC* 我觉得.../",

  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_991_0": "* .../",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_992_0": "* 不会再回来了。/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_1013_0": "* ..^1.喂^1！等一等^1！\n兰瑟！！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_1014_0": "* 你怎么突然变得这么奇怪？！/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_follow_slash_Step_0_gml_1038_0": "* 苏-苏西^1，等等...！/%",
  "obj_lancerchase2_slash_Step_0_gml_43_0": "* 光之民正在接近城堡...！/",
  "obj_lancerchase2_slash_Step_0_gml_44_0": "* 抓住他们...！/%",
  "obj_castlefront_event_slash_Step_0_gml_24_0": "* 兰瑟！/%",
  "obj_castlefront_event_slash_Step_0_gml_58_0": "* 喂^1，你要搞什么...！？/%",
  "obj_castlefront_event_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0": "* 他们无路可逃了！/%",
  "obj_castlefront_event_slash_Step_0_gml_163_0": "* 请..^1. 请等一下...！/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_29_0": "* 呵呵呵..^1.\n你们这些可悲的光之民啊.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_30_0": "* 我们奉命将你们永远囚禁..^1.\n真可惜！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_31_0": "* ..^1.本来还很期待看你们受折磨呢！^1！\n哈哈哈！！/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_82_0": "* 啊..^1. 哦.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0": "\\E6* 这种欢迎方式还真是特别呢^1，\n对吧^1，克里斯？/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_84_0": "\\E3* 永远囚禁.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_85_0": "\\E1* ..^1.听起来是挺长的一段时间。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_86_0": "\\E1* .../%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_104_0": "* ..^1.对了^1，苏西^1！\n苏西在哪！？/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_105_0": "\\E3* 我们得快点找到她^1，克里斯..^1.\n趁她还没受伤！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0": "\\E1* ..^1.或者^1，唔^1，\n趁她还没伤人.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_107_0": "\\E6* 有没有什么东西能帮我们\n逃出这里呢...？/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_608_0": "* （这是一扇金属门。）\n* （你晃了晃栅栏...）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_609_0": "* （毫无作用...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1717_0": "* （这些镣铐看起来意外地时髦。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1718_0": "* （要拿走吗？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1423_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1713_0": "\n拿走",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1901_0": "\n不买",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1733_0": "* （你带的防具太多了。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1738_0": "* （铁制镣铐被放进了你的【防具】中。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1744_0": "* （不需要任何东西就能束缚你...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1723_0": "* （没有什么东西能束缚你了...）/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_307_0": "* 克里斯^1，情况可能不太妙^1，\n但是.../",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_308_0": "\\E6* 你一定可以想出办法的！/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_312_0": "* 克里斯^1，不如再四处看看吧？/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1687_0": "* （生命的存在离不开进食。）\n* （哪怕是苔藓也要喝水。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1688_0": "* （延续生命存在的循环？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1689_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1683_0": "\n延续",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1939_0": "\n不买",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1702_0": "* （你吃掉了苔藓。）\n* （尝起来..^1. 藓藓的。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1703_0": "* （你的HP被苔高到了极藓。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1693_0": "* （苔藓被吃掉了。）\n* （循环得以延续...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1708_0": "* （在一间小牢房的角落中^1，\n循环到此为止...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_610_0": "* （一扇金属门。）\n* （被锁住了。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_613_0": "* （这扇缺席的金属门特别显眼。）/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_323_0": "* 那么^1，克里斯^1，\n你找到什么了吗...！？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_324_0": "\\E1* .../%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_328_0": "\\E1* ..^1.你嘴边那些绿色的东西\n是什么？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_329_0": "* ..^1.才在监狱里待了两分钟^1，\n你就已经开始吃苔藓了。/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_330_0": "\\E6* 唔^1，你真是个..^1. 实干家^1，\n克里斯！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_331_0": "\\E1* .../%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_337_0": "\\E6* 噢..^1. 克里斯..^1.\n你^1，呃.../",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_338_0": "\\E1* ..^1.你给自己戴上了镣铐。/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_339_0": "\\E8* 你..^1. 你戴上它真好看！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_340_0": "\\E6* 唔^1，相当有终身囚犯的样子^1！\n哈哈！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_341_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_348_0": "\\E1* ..^1.你嘴边那些绿色的东西\n是什么？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_349_0": "\\E6* ..^1.才在监狱里待了两分钟^1，\n你就已经开始吃苔藓了。/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_350_0": "\\E1* 你甚至戴上了镣铐^1，\n这样^1，唔.../",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_351_0": "\\E6* 你看起来就像一个终身囚犯了^1！\n哈哈！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_352_0": "\\E1* .../%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_140_0": "* ..^1.看来你什么也没找到.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_141_0": "\\E6* 好吧^1，克里斯^1！\n我们先不要放弃希望！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_142_0": "\\E6* .../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_143_0": "\\E1* 但是^1，唔^1，假如我们\n真的没办法逃出这里.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_144_0": "\\E6* 那么^1，我只想说^1，唔.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_145_0": "\\E1* 我..^1. 我真的很开心\n能与你们.../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0": "* 喂^1，蠢货们^1！\n能不能把嘴闭上！？/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_148_0": "* 你们害我分心了！！/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_179_0": "* 苏-苏西！^1？你在哪儿！？/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_181_0": "* 不知道^1，大概是监狱吧？/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_207_0": "* 严格来说^1。\n我已经在牢房外面了。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_208_0": "* 我说了几句好话就让守卫\n把钥匙交出来了。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_210_0": "* 真的吗！^1？苏西！！^1？\n你是怎么做到的？/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_229_0": "\\E2* 我^1，那啥，“邀请”他去\n垃圾桶里做客了。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_232_0": "\\E0* 总之^1，现在有个谜题拦在前头。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_234_0": "* 好^1！快解开它^1，苏西！/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_252_0": "* 呃..^1. 我才..^1.\n不解..^1. 谜题。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_253_0": "\\E0* .../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_254_0": "\\E2* 嘿^1，要不我们就乖乖坐在这里\n等兰瑟来吧？/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_255_0": "\\E2* 他就住在城堡里^1，\n一定会来救我们的。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_257_0": "* ..^1.为什么不让克里斯和我\n帮你解决谜题呢？/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_259_0": "* 听着^1，我不需要你们的帮助。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_260_0": "* .../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_261_0": "\\E6* ..^1.但是^1，呃^1，如果你把解法^1，\n大声地喊出来，/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_262_0": "\\E2* 我也懒得阻止你。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_264_0": "* （克里斯^1，\n告诉苏西该怎么做吧。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1658_0": "\n加黑桃",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1659_0": "\n加方块",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1660_0": "切换",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1662_0": "\\C3 ",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_309_0": "* 耶！！^1！我们成功啦！！！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_300_0": "\\E0* .../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_311_0": "\\E7* 搞什么^1？明明就差一点了！\n* 算我们过了吧！/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_299_0": "* 总算成功了！！！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_310_0": "\\E0* .../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_301_0": "\\E7* 靠^1！等等^1！我们又搞砸了！/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_322_0": "* ..^1.看起来重置了。/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_329_0": "* ..^1.又重置了。/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_336_0": "* 克里斯^1，你真的知道自己在\n做什么吗...？/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_343_0": "* 别再重置了！！\n* 这个谜题我自己来解决！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_344_0": "\\E0* .../",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_345_0": "\\E6* 好吧^1，我不会.../%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_354_0": "* ..^1.呃^1，这招漂亮^1，克里斯。/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_376_0": "* 好！！^1！成功了！！！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_378_0": "* 太棒啦！^1！快来放我们出去！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_380_0": "* 好好^1，别急！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1753_0": "\\E6* ..^1.谢谢你帮助她^1，克里斯^1。\n她会很感激的。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1561_0": "\\E1* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1755_0": "\\E1* 克里斯.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1756_0": "\\E6* 你在担心苏西吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1719_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_595_0": "\n是的",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1750_0": "\n她不会\n有事的",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1762_0": "\\E6* 呃^1，无论你怎么想.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1763_0": "\\E0* 我觉得都可以花点时间.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1764_0": "\\E6* 想想她正在做什么.../%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1772_0": "\\E0* （好..^1. 终于离开牢房了...）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1773_0": "* （接下来去哪...？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1757_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1768_0": "\n往左走",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1780_0": "\\E9* 呃...^1？克里斯...^1？\n你有说什么吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1769_0": "\n往右走",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1781_0": "\\E0* （..^1.我听不见了...）/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_79_0": "* （..^1.我就往这边走吧。）/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_105_0": "* （..^1.好吧^1，这是条死路...）/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0": "* （那..^1.那是兰瑟的声音！）/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_175_0": "* 该死^1，又来了.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_190_0": "* （..^1.也许我该回去问问\n克里斯...）/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_200_0": "* ..^1.确保他们.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_209_0": "\\E9* （兰瑟...）/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_232_0": "* （我..^1. 我自己来！）/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_330_0": "* 懂了没^1？\n必须让他们待在各自的牢房里。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_331_0": "* 绝不能让光之民逃跑。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_332_0": "* ..^1.尤其是紫色的那个。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_334_0": "* ..^1.兰瑟？/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_354_0": "* 苏..^1. 苏西？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_355_0": "* ..^1.你-你怎么在这里...？/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_385_0": "* .../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_386_0": "\\E9* 兰瑟^1，克里斯和利艾尔斯都还\n被关着呢.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_388_0": "* 我..^1. 我知道。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_389_0": "* 是我.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_407_0": "* 是我向士兵们下令把你们\n关在这里的。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_408_0": "\\E5* 为了.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_409_0": "\\E6* 为了永远.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_410_0": "\\E5* 把你们关在这里。/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_440_0": "* 兰..^1. 兰瑟..^1.\n你..^1. 你.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_441_0": "* 你竟然想抛弃我们...？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_442_0": "* .../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_443_0": "\\EC* 我还以为我们是队友呢.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_445_0": "* 你..^1. 你听我解释^1，苏西.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_462_0": "* .../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_463_0": "\\E0* 算了。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_464_0": "* 没事的。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_465_0": "* 没事的^1，真的。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_466_0": "* 你用不着解释。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_467_0": "* 我..^1. 明白的。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_468_0": "* 我明白的。/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_500_0": "* 怎么会有人愿意.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_501_0": "\\E1* ..^1.当我的朋友呢？/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_526_0": "* 苏西^1，不是这样-/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_528_0": "* 闭嘴。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_530_0": "* 可是-/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_532_0": "* 闭嘴！/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_560_0": "* 给我滚开。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_562_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_595_0": "* 听到没？\n* 我说了^1，滚。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_597_0": "* .../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_598_0": "\\E5* 不..^1. 不行。/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_627_0": "* 你耳朵聋吗...？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_628_0": "\\E1* 行^1，我警告过你了.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_659_0": "* 那么^1，别指望我会\n感到愧疚.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_691_0": "* ..^1.哪怕你被打成一滩烂泥。/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_88_0": "* ...",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_120_0": "你想知道\n叛徒的下场\n是怎样的吗？/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_121_0": "那就是被\n碾^1，成^1，渣。/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_122_0": "你要是\n不给我滚.../",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_122_1": "..^1.我就\n杀了你。/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_123_0": "明白了吗^1？\n我会\n杀了你。/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0": "呵..^1.\n没打中^1，\n蠢货！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_127_0": "..^1.等等^1，\n你为什么\n不还手...？/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_135_0": "..^1.呵^1，\n你以为我会\n手下留情吗？/",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_136_0": "你要愿意\n等死也行。/",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0": "这样我还\n轻松些！/%",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_145_0": ".......^1.\n好了^1，\n够了。/",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_145_1": "你要是\n这么想死.../",
  "obj_lancerboss2_slash_Step_0_gml_145_2": "那就去死吧！/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_762_0": "* 苏..^1. 苏西...？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_763_0": "* 你..^1. 没打中.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_781_0": "* 我.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_782_0": "\\E0* 我不想杀你。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_783_0": "\\EC* 让开吧^1。求你了。/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_794_0": "* 可..^1. 可是苏西^1，\n要是我放你们走了.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_795_0": "\\EB* 你们就会和我爸爸打起来^1，\n那..^1. 那样的话.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_796_0": "\\EA* 会出人命的。/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_814_0": "* .../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_816_0": "* ..^1.至少你们待在这里.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_817_0": "* 就不会有人受伤了。/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_849_0": "* .../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_850_0": "* 那么我..^1. 我.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_878_0": "* 我不杀他^1。我保证。/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_879_0": "\\EC* 我只是要和他^1，呃.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_880_0": "\\ED* 聊一聊^1。\n和平万岁^1。懂吧。/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_892_0": "* 我.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_893_0": "\\E5* 我不觉得我爸爸会同意.../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_925_0": "* 嘿^1，兰瑟^1！振作点！/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_926_0": "* 你忘了我们是队友吗！？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_927_0": "* 管它有没有战斗^1！\n没什么能阻挡我们^1！懂了没？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_929_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_944_0": "* ..^1.对^1！你^1，你说的没错...！/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_945_0": "* 试一试又何妨！/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_946_0": "\\E2* 我也能帮忙！/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_947_0": "\\E3* 我先去和我爸爸谈一谈^1！\n给他做做思想工作！/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_949_0": "* 哈^1，这才像话嘛！/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_951_0": "* 我这就去！！！/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_978_0": "* 苏..^1. 苏西？/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_995_0": "* ..^1. 怎么了？/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_1012_0": "* 我们.../",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_1013_0": "\\E7* 我们还是朋友吧？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_1015_0": "* 呃..^1. 啊？/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_1016_0": "\\E6* 当..^1. 当然了！\n* 我是说^1，只要你愿意^1！\n我们当然还是朋友了！/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_1028_0": "* 那我就放心啦^1！再见！/%",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_1046_0": "* （..^1.这下我要怎么对付\n他爸爸...？）/",
  "obj_lancerbattle2_event_slash_Step_0_gml_1047_0": "\\ED* （管..^1. 管他的^1，\n车到山前必有路！）/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_481_0": "* ..^1.事情就是这样^1，\n明白了吗^1，克里斯？/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_521_0": "* ..^1.嘿。/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_523_0": "* 苏西^1！你来救我们了...！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_524_0": "\\E8* 我就知道你有一颗英雄般的心^1，\n苏西！/",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_526_0": "* 行了行了^1，见好就收吧。/%",
  "obj_prisonevent_slash_Step_0_gml_543_0": "* （克里斯和利艾尔斯加入了队伍！）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_606_0": "* 多谢邀请^1！这个垃圾桶真的很棒！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_607_0": "* 对于之前造成的不便^1，我深感抱歉！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_610_0": "* 我也要邀请朋友们来这个垃圾桶！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_591_0": "* 苏西的第一次独自解谜... \n* 多么美好的回忆啊。/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_593_0": "* 别那么深情地回忆我！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_598_0": "* （墙上有一个裂缝...）\n* （里面会是什么呢...？）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_599_0": "* （..^1.墙的里面还是墙。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_602_0": "* （里面除了糟糕的建筑设计之外\n什么也没有。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_898_0": "* 是啊^1，就连我也被抓起来了.../",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_899_0": "* 我只是一双眼睛啊^1！\n这世界到底怎么了！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_902_0": "* （已经解决过的谜题。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_908_0": "* 哇^1，苏西^1，你自己一个人\n解开了这个谜题？/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_909_0": "\\E7* 看来你真的很想救我们.../",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_911_0": "* 啊！^1？才没有^1，我只是...！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_912_0": "\\E6* 不小心..^1. 解开了而已。/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_914_0": "* 不小心？/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_916_0": "* 我还以为这是^1，呃^1，\n一台老虎机。/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_917_0": "* 没想到奖品却是俩呆子。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_920_0": "* 你真是了不起^1，苏西。/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_922_0": "* 好吧^1，随你怎么说。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_626_0": "* 搞什么？！\n* 你们的牢房里居然有苔藓？！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_627_0": "\\E0* （真不公平...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_628_0": "\\E0* （都没给我留点...）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_618_0": "* （啊^1，噢^1。我只是个笼子。）\n* （没人跟我说话的！）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_619_0": "* （你们喜欢这场演出吗？）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_620_0": "* （我叫金泰阳。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_621_0": "* （当第四个笼子是很“监”苦的。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_638_0": "* 唉^1！唉！\n* 我们是三位前国王！\n* 求求你^1，放了我们吧！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_639_0": "* 曾经^1，这里由我们四人一起统治^1，\n但骑士到来之后^1，一切都变了.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_640_0": "* 唉^1，我的钻石^1！我的珠宝！\n* 请告诉我们^1，它们是否还平安无事？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_644_0": "* 你说什么^1？你们的世界陷入了危机？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_645_0": "* 好吧^1，那还挺惨的^1，是吧。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_665_0": "* 我由于未经许可擅自制作谜题\n而被逮捕了.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_666_0": "* 我..^1. 我再也不制作找词谜题了^1！\n我保证！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_653_0": "* 我由于不想和你们战斗^1，\n而被关了起来.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_654_0": "* 我怎么能对你们下手呢^1？\n你们看起来比国王好太多了...！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_659_0": "* 哈哈^1，我宁可进监狱也不愿\n和你们打^1！你们太恐怖了！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_626_0": "* （以前我们动物都待在各自的笼子里。）\n* （现在却如此拥挤。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_627_0": "* （好多新面孔..^1. \n真是怀念过去美好的时光...）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_628_0": "* （这肮脏囚笼中只有我们的时光。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_632_0": "* （各种动物的叫声混杂在了一起。）/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_353_0": "\\EB* 好^1，这个电梯应该能\n带我们离开。/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_384_0": "* 不过^1，可能会花上点时间^1，\n所以.../%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_419_0": "\\E0* 大家怎么舒服怎么来吧！/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_448_0": "* ..^1.嘿^1。利艾尔斯。/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_449_0": "* 你知道兰瑟他爸..^1. \n那个国王吗？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_451_0": "* 知道...？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_453_0": "* 等我们见到他之后... \n* 我们是不是必须得.../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_454_0": "\\EC* ..^1.伤害他？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_456_0": "* 苏西...？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_458_0": "\\E7* 我是说^1，要我揍扁他很容易^1，\n可是.../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_459_0": "\\E0* 但我知道^1，这不是你们的\n行事风格。/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_460_0": "\\E2* 你们就喜欢^1，呃^1，\n像群废物一样婆婆妈妈的。/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_476_0": "\\E0* 所以我在想..^1. 也许.../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_477_0": "\\E6* 我也能..^1. 学习一下你们？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_479_0": "* 苏西！^1？\n你是说你也想【行动】吗...？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_481_0": "* 唔.../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_483_0": "* 苏西..^1. 我们当然乐意\n和你一起【行动】了！/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_484_0": "\\E0* 不必担心^1，\n我们会手把手教你的！/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_485_0": "\\E6* 这样你就不用自己摸索了。/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_487_0": "* .../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_488_0": "\\EC* ..^1.好^1，行吧。/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_503_0": "\\EC* .../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_504_0": "\\E0* 喂^1。利艾尔斯。/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_506_0": "* 苏西？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_508_0": "* 你.../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_509_0": "\\E6* 你还打算^1，呃^1，\n做蛋糕吗...？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_511_0": "* 如果我做蛋糕的话^1，\n你就不会再拿我开玩笑了吗？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_513_0": "* .../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_514_0": "\\E2* 如果我没得选^1，大概吧。/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_516_0": "* 那就让你吃个够^1，怎么样？/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_518_0": "* 行啊^1，说的好像你真能做得出\n那么多似的。/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_605_0": "\\E0* 噢^1，我们到了！/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_644_0": "\\E0* 克里斯^1，等一下。/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_674_0": "* 我突然想到。/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_675_0": "* 如果我们能^1，呃^1，\n更加“团结”一些的话.../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_676_0": "* 想离开这里就容易得多了。/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_677_0": "* 所以等下次我们和敌人\n战斗的时候.../%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_691_0": "\\EC* 你告诉我什么..^1. 我就做什么。/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_709_0": "\\E1* ..^1.但可别让我干什么蠢事，/",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_710_0": "\\E2* 不然我就做回那个战斗狂^1，\n听懂了没有？！/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_774_0": "\\E0* 克里斯.../",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_775_0": "\\EC* 我可全指望你了^1，好吗？/%",
  "obj_elevatorcontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_798_0": "* （苏西真正地加入了队伍。）",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2866_0": "* （要乘电梯前往哪里？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2867_0": "\\C3",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2862_0": "\n地下监狱",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2863_0": "\n1楼",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2864_0": "？？？？",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2892_0": "* （你已经在那里了。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2908_0": "* （你已经在那里了。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2924_0": "* （你已经在那里了。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2689_0": "* 呜呼^1，呜呼^1，呃嘿嘿。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2690_0": "* 我如此孤独^1，孤独如我.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2691_0": "* 转眼一瞧^1，里头站着三位访客...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2692_0": "* 你们是谁？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2694_0": "* 幸会^1！我是利艾尔斯^1，\n这位是克里斯^1，还有.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2696_0": "* 那么^1，你在那里头搞什么鬼呢？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2698_0": "\\TJ* 我是无辜的^1，无辜的。\n* 我只想玩个游戏^1，玩个游戏。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2699_0": "* 可是那无聊的国王们\n却对我的小小娱乐极为不满。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2700_0": "* 他们气急败坏地要惩罚我^1，\n要把我囚禁起来。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2701_0": "* 但我很快^1，很快^1，\n很聪明^1，很聪明。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2702_0": "* 国王们抓不到我^1，\n便把自己的族人统统关了起来，/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2703_0": "* 他们围绕整个世界建起了监狱^1。\n现在我是唯一自由的人。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2705_0": "* 啊^1？自由^1？可你显然才是\n被关起来的那个.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2707_0": "\\TJ* 从我的角度看并非如此^1，光之民！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2709_0": "* 好吧^1，\n那这么说你是不需要帮助了。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2711_0": "\\TJ* 并非如此。\n* 在这小小的自由世界中^1，我感到孤独。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2712_0": "* 所以^1，你想不想和我^1，\n玩个游戏...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2713_0": "* 我会带你见识一下真正的自由！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1774_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2685_0": "\n玩游戏",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2686_0": "\n不玩游戏",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2724_0": "\n玩游戏",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2725_0": "\n不玩游戏",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2718_0": "* 找到钥匙^1，我就放你自由^1，自由。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2731_0": "* 找到钥匙^1，我就放你自由^1，自由。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2719_0": "* 钥匙被藏了起来^1。\n老店主知道秘密。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2732_0": "* 钥匙被藏了起来^1。\n老店主知道秘密。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2737_0": "* 呜呼^1，呜呼^1，呃嘿嘿。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2738_0": "* 你已经在游戏中了^1，\n又怎能拒绝呢...？/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_726_0": "* （通往顶楼的电梯。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_727_0": "* （电梯停在了顶楼^1，\n必须等人乘它下来才能使用。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_730_0": "* （通往顶楼的电梯。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_731_0": "* （不再停在顶楼了。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_738_0": "* （通往监狱的电梯。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_739_0": "* （曾被叫做“通往只是碰巧有很多笼子\n的地下室的电梯”。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_721_0": "* （方钻的房间。）\n* （没错^1，这是一扇门！）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_675_0": "* 我们卖掉了所有的床铺^1，\n把它们换成了宝藏。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_676_0": "* 我的背好痛^1，但生活从未如此美好！！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_694_0": "* 嘿^1，是你啊！\n* 那位和善的光之民！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_695_0": "* 哇^1，你居然还驯服了那头\n折磨我们的野兽...！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_697_0": "* ..^1.野兽？\n* 什么野兽？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_699_0": "* 哇哦！^1！你居然还教会野兽说话了？！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_700_0": "* 来^1，尝一块方钻巧克力吧！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_701_0": "* （你获得了方钻巧克力。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_706_0": "* 不好意思^1，我们装不下它了。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_708_0": "* 没事^1，我已经吃下去了。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_685_0": "* 听我说^1，你们两位是真正的英雄！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_687_0": "* 那我呢？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_689_0": "* 你也是^1，会说话的野兽... \n* 你也是。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2789_0": "\n诚挚\n道歉",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2790_0": "\n恐吓",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2793_0": "* 嘿^1！你们是之前揍我的人！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2794_0": "* 我不会原谅你们的^1，快滚！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2806_0": "* 对不起^1，之前是我们不对！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2807_0": "\\E8* 我们保证不会再犯了！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2809_0": "* 嗯...^1？你们愿意道歉^1？\n那我勉为其难原谅你们好了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2810_0": "* （你对一个方钻所施展的暴力\n得到了谅解！）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2822_0": "* 呵^1，你想这么干...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2823_0": "\\E3* 要么原谅我^1，要么我把你\n碾碎^1，蠢货！！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2825_0": "* 对..^1. 对不起^1！我原谅你！^1！\n来^1，收下这块方钻巧克力吧！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2826_0": "* （你获得了方钻巧克力。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2831_0": "* 不好意思^1，我们装不下了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2833_0": "* 太迟了^1，我已经吃下去了。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_723_0": "* 我..^1. 永远也不会原谅\n自己原谅了你们这件事.../%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_727_0": "* 我现在对你们感觉一般般.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_728_0": "* ..^1.等等^1，那她呢？\n* 她还会伤害我们吗？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_730_0": "* 不不^1，你没错。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_731_0": "\\E2* （除非克里斯让我这么做。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_718_0": "* 你们没我想象中那么好.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_719_0": "* 也许是人们不配有英雄。/%",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_414_0": "* 方钻连者们闪亮登场！",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_158_0": "* 方钻连者 - 攻击 8 防御 0\n* 五彩缤纷理应是佳话^1，\n但唯独红色令它们趋之若骛。/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_11_0": "国王万岁！",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_12_0": "布灵布灵\n闪亮闪亮",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_13_0": "消逝吧^1，\n光之民！",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_14_0": "我可是钻石^1，\n我要来硬的了！",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_81_0": "* 方钻连者光彩照人。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_82_0": "* 方钻连者为自己的感情\n装上了功率限制器。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0": "* 方钻连者幻想着神圣宝石。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_84_0": "* 方钻连者在宣誓效忠。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_85_0": "* 闻起来像水晶。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_190_0": "* 你让苏西【称赞】敌人！/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_192_0": "* ..^1.呃^1，你认真的？/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_193_0": "\\E2* 对于想要我们命的家伙^1，\n有什么可称赞的？/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_195_0": "* 唔^1，苏西..^1. \n要是你没有头绪的话^1，\n不妨试试.../",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_196_0": "* ..^1.说些你想从别人口中\n听到的话？/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_198_0": "* .../",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_199_0": "\\E2* “你已获准再次参加\n免费火腿三明治节”/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_21_0": "从来没人\n对我说过\n那样的话...",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_22_0": "国王从没\n对我说过\n那样的话...",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_181_0": "* 苏西【称赞】了敌人...？/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_184_0": "* “你的穿着一点也不恶心。”/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_185_0": "* “请继续撞击饮料机。”/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_186_0": "* 很好^1，你们看起来一副\n想杀了我们的样子。/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_205_0": "* 苏西故意没有【称赞】敌人！/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_207_0": "* 听着^1，要是我继续这么干\n两边都会很尴尬。/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_25_0": "对啊^1，\n会很尴尬。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_167_0": "* 你试着解释为什么战斗是不好的。/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_168_0": "* 但方钻连者仅仅是变得\\cB疲惫\\cW了.../%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Draw_0_gml_6_0": "（疲惫）",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_17_0": "够了^1！\n你说服不了我！",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_86_0": "* 方钻连者快要睡着了。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_87_0": "* 方钻连者的光泽逐渐消退。",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_88_0": "* 方钻连者受宠若惊。",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_754_0": "* （看来心桃卖掉了所有的宝石^1，\n并把它们换成了床铺。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_755_0": "* （看来是舒舒服服地睡了一觉。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_764_0": "* （心桃温柔地看着你^1。\n你对心桃犯下的罪孽被原谅了。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_792_0": "* （心桃永远不会忘记你的所作所为。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_794_0": "* 好的那种？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_796_0": "* （坏的那种。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_798_0": "* 哦。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_805_0": "* （似乎是一张床。）\n* （要在这里休息吗？）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_806_0": "* （..^1. 不行。）\n* （这不是你的床。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_815_0": "* （你把所有的床都仔细地调查过了。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_816_0": "* （你已升级为“\\cY床铺调查员\\cW。”）/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_122_0": "好了好了^1，\n你们说服我了！！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_770_0": "* 很抱歉之前伤害你们.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_771_0": "\\E8* 我们保证不会再犯了！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_773_0": "* （心桃感受到了你的真诚^1。\n心桃饶恕了你的罪孽...）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_774_0": "* （你感觉如释重负。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_786_0": "* （心桃温柔地看着你^1。\n你也有同样的感觉。）/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_235_0": "你在开玩笑吗^1？\n我可不能辞职^1。\n阻止你\n是我的工作！/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_245_0": "* 真的？\n* 那你的钱都怎么花？/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_253_0": "我是一个\n普通人。/",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_254_0": "我把钱\n都花在\n房租和\n神秘宝石上了。/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_264_0": "* （克里斯^1，再试试【说服】他们...）/%",
  "obj_rudinnranger_slash_Step_0_gml_169_0": "（疲惫）",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_755_0": "* （城堡厕所“同花大顺”）\n* （有人在用。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_749_0": "* （似乎是张全家福。）/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_58_0": "看来蠕虫们\n总算肯出来玩了.../%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_71_0": "* 是谁！？/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_78_0": "咕哈哈哈哈^1！\n汝等蠢货！/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_121_0": "\\E0* 吾乃卢斯·卡德^1，\n汝等大敌！/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_122_0": "\\E4* 汝等或已挣扎\n爬过诸多谜题.../",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_123_0": "\\E2* 然此等谜题之作者\n皆乌合之众尔！/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0": "\\E3* 那么^1，做好准备吧。\n* 准备好面对毕生最难的谜题！/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_164_0": "\\E2* 苦思冥想吧^1，蠕虫们！/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_208_0": "* .../",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_209_0": "\\E1* 我/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_210_0": "* 靠/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_295_0": "\\E4* 咕哈哈.../",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0": "* 汝等真以为\n吾只有如此能耐！？/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_297_0": "\\E1* 非也^1！感受吾的真正力量吧！/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_298_0": "\\E2* 见证吧！\n* 吾之究极谜题！/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_341_0": "\\E2* 颤抖吧！/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_385_0": "\\E1* .../",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_386_0": "\\E6* ..................../",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_387_0": "\\E5* 啊.../",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_388_0": "\\E5* 哈..^1. 哈...！\n* 哈哈哈！\n* 果真上当了^1，蠕虫！/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_389_0": "\\E5* 此并非吾之真正究极谜题！/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_390_0": "\\E4* 吾有更加绝妙之谜题^1，\n就在..^1. 此处！/",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_392_0": "* 能让... \n* 我们见识下吗？/%",
  "obj_rurus_event_slash_Step_0_gml_404_0": "* 不行/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_746_0": "* （唉...）\n卢斯·卡德曾立于此处.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_747_0": "* （唉...）\n我觉得制作推箱子谜题\n是个非常性感的爱好.../%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_806_0": "* （唉...）\n卢斯·卡德曾立于此处.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_807_0": "* （唉...）抱歉我老是唉声叹气的^1，\n我有点睡眠不足。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_823_0": "* 我是第一个来参加“牌队”的。\n* 我负责DPS。\n* （打盘手。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_824_0": "* （一张三人床^1，\n或者是三个头的生物睡的床。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_829_0": "* （一个巨型棒球。）\n* （派对用的。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_832_0": "* （实际上^1，这个巨型棒球是一个\n被重新涂色了的足球。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_833_0": "* （这样涂起来比较容易。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_838_0": "* （一棵树。）\n* （派对用的。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_817_0": "* 你们有受到邀请吗？\n* 你们没有！！！\n* 你们伤害了我们.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_818_0": "* 尴尬哦... \n* 你想要重赛！？\n* 你还是走吧.../%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_812_0": "* 哦^1！外套请交给我们！\n* 然后丢马桶里^1！哈！\n* ..^1.可我们这没有马桶。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_813_0": "* 请尝尝棒球~！\n* 对^1！噎死你们！\n* ..^1.他们也吃体育吗？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_814_0": "* 我们来玩扭扭乐吧~！\n* 别来打扰我们！\n* ..^1.我们连自己都玩不赢。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_78_0": "* （一台点唱机。）\n* （音乐好听到梅花说。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_827_0": "* （心桃是第二个来参加“牌队”的^1。\n它负责治疗。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_828_0": "* （她负责准备食物。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_829_0": "* （可惜她订的蛋糕\n在平原的某处被毁掉了。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_832_0": "* （每个订蛋糕的人都难免遇到\n类似的状况。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_849_0": "* （一辆被精心安放在床上的自行车。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2844_0": "* （一台音乐播放器。）\n* （要听一听吗？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1859_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2840_0": "\n听一听",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2841_0": "\n不听",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_925_0": "* （...）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2853_0": "* （里面播的全是卡通啪叽声。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2857_0": "* （你选择不听。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_862_0": "* （某种挖掘用具。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_869_0": "* （你在洞里发现了20卢比！）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_870_0": "* （可惜的是^1，\n不能在这里当作货币来用...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_874_0": "* （为了取乐挖出来的洞。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_878_0": "* （埋在地里的辣椒酱。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_853_0": "* （一个洞。）\n* （大概是挖来玩的。）/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_73_0": "\\E0* 欢迎来到吾之商店^1，\n汝等没良心的蠕虫。",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_74_0": "\\E0* 欢迎^1，欢迎^1，\n吾英勇的同志们！",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_82_0": "购买",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_83_0": "出售",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_84_0": "交谈",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_85_0": "离开",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_115_0": "离开",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_202_0": "\\E5啊^1，汝欲\n了解何事？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_194_0": "关于你自己",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_195_0": "为什么卖东西给我们",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_196_0": "国王",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_197_0": "国王的儿子",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_198_0": "离开",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_358_0": "\\E0* 吾乃谜题公爵^1，卢斯·卡德。/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_359_0": "\\E4* 吾之爱好包括书法^1，守法^1，\n养虫^1，囚笼.../",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_360_0": "\\E1* ..^1.还有在地牢里散步。/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_361_0": "\\E5* 蠕虫们^1，汝等可为吾之仰慕者？/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_364_0": "\\E5* 另^1，方才多有得罪^1，\n莫往心里去^1，可否？/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_371_0": "\\E4* 哈哈哈！^1！这样吾便可聚财^1，\n蠕虫们^1！聚千军万马之财.../",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_372_0": "\\E1* 届时吾可将汝等捣碎^1，\n如发酵葡萄一般^1，\n制成最美味的成人之佳酿--/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_373_0": "\\E6* “酒仇得报”^1！啊哈哈哈！！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_374_0": "\\E5* 嘻^1，吾何其擅长自娱自乐哉！！/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_378_0": "\\E2* 哈哈^1，汝等可是吾之同胞^1！\n向传说中的英雄们售物^1，善！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_379_0": "\\E5* 方才之事^1，不过是考验\n汝等之英勇信念也！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_380_0": "\\E6* 卢斯总是获胜的那方！^1！\n汝等可以为此打赌！！！/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_386_0": "\\E6* 吾王乃残忍可怖之暴君也！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_387_0": "\\E2* 然而^1，吾王也同等贤明^1，\n因为他封我为谜题公爵，/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_388_0": "\\E6* 将其他众人^1，\n或革职解雇^1，\n或打入囚笼。/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_389_0": "\\E4* 吾王^1，何其仁爱！/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_392_0": "\\E6* 国王^1！糟糕之君^1，丑行之主！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_393_0": "\\E2* 吾从来就没真心喜欢过那家伙！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_394_0": "\\E3* 不过吾思忖^1，或许..^1.\n吾若被授予高职.../",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_395_0": "\\E5* 吾可从内部蚕食^1，\n里应外合^1，将王推翻！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_396_0": "\\E6* ..^1.什么！^1？\n难道汝等理解不了吾之良策？！？/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_402_0": "\\E0* 他的嫡儿^1，从另一方面来说^1，\n比一撮跳蚤还麻烦！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_403_0": "\\E1* 他总问吾最糟糕的问题，/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_404_0": "\\E3* 还把吾唤作“小爸爸”。/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_405_0": "\\E6* 你这小水鳖^1，\n你我二人非亲非故^1！\n吾照拂汝^1，全因你父亲也！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_406_0": "\\E6* 吾才不愿听你MP3里的歌^1！\n吾宁愿听那甜美的死亡之歌！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_407_0": "\\E3* .../",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_408_0": "\\E2* 话说回来^1，他近日可好？/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_413_0": "\\E3* 或许^1，吾言之过重了..^1.\n国王之子^1，是个宝贝！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_414_0": "\\E6* 一个奇怪还气人的宝贝！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_415_0": "\\E3* 因其父不会下厨^1，\n此子嗷嗷待哺^1，像只小鸟^1，\n吾不得不以蠕虫喂养他！/",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_416_0": "\\E6* 身居高职^1，岂应做这种事！？/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_124_0": "\\E0汝等需购\n何物？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Create_0_gml_73_0": "物品\n香醇的\n酱汁\n回复50HP",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_112_0": "卢斯油面酱",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_113_0": "回复\n50HP",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Create_0_gml_74_0": "武器\n英勇帅气",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_139_0": "勇气之斧",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_140_0": "一把来自方块战士的闪光斧头。\n英雄适用。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_141_0": "你非要塞给我的话^1，那好吧。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_142_0": "它有点太重了...",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_155_0": "胆量提升",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Create_0_gml_75_0": "武器\n纯手工制作\n提升治疗效果",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_223_0": "精致围巾",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_224_0": "能提升治疗效果的精致围巾\n但没有攻击力。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_225_0": "这可是用梭编桌垫做的！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_226_0": "我会保护大家的！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_239_0": "毛绒度提升",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Create_0_gml_76_0": "防具\n提升防御\n的护符",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_26_0": "琥珀卡片",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_27_0": "一块黏在你身上的正方形护符，\n能够提高防御。",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_28_0": "..^1.总比没有好。",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_29_0": "这东西黏糊糊的^1，克里斯...",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_70_0": "\\E0* 可否需要别的？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_125_0": "\\E2感谢你^1，\n蠕虫。",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_126_0": "\\E2感谢你^1，\n英雄！",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_127_0": "\\E3何不看看\n其他货？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_128_0": "\\E6汝\n盘缠\n紧缺。",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_129_0": "\\E3汝\n行李\n繁重！",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_130_0": "/*",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_144_0": "汝欲购之？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_145_0": " ",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_146_0": "是",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_147_0": "否",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_236_0": "售物品",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_237_0": "售武器",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_238_0": "售防具",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_243_0": "\\E0给吾看看\n汝的宝藏！",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_239_0": "返回之",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_244_0": "\\E2那就是\n全部了^1，\n对否？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_245_0": "\\E6汝所持\n无物！",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_305_0": "\\E0汝欲售\n何种\n物品？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_306_0": "\\E0汝欲售\n何种\n武器？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_307_0": "\\E0汝欲售\n何种\n防具？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_308_0": "\\E5此物可\n为吾\n所用！",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_309_0": "\\E6什么？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_310_0": "\\E6呃^1，\n不要^1，\n谢谢。",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_311_0": "\\E6什么？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_323_0": "要出售吗？",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_324_0": " ",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_325_0": "是",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_326_0": "否",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_353_0": "\\E5* 地牢见^1，蠕虫们！/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_354_0": "\\E5* 后会有期^1，吾之佳虫！/%",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_478_0": "空位：",
  "obj_shop2_slash_Draw_0_gml_481_0": "已满",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_45_0": "够了^1，蠕虫们...！/%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_88_0": "* 尽管汝等以作弊之法\n破解吾之谜题^1，然.../",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_89_0": "* 短兵相接之时^1，\n必是汝等抱头鼠窜！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_90_0": "* 来吧^1，无赖之徒...^1！\n准备好挑战...！/%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_145_0": "* 这不知是啥的玩意儿！！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0": "* 啊...！？\n* 这是之前的敌人...！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_148_0": "* 但是它的皇冠看着不太一样^3！\\f0 ^3/%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_133_0": "* ..^1.明明一模一样。",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_161_0": "* 正是如此^1！\n有了吾的操控之冠.../",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0": "* 吾可致任意碟形生物\n于吾之掌控！/%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_181_0": "* 这下不妙了！！！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_182_0": "* 它看上去很痛苦^3！\\f1 ^3 /%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_143_0": "* 明明一模一样啊！！！！",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_194_0": "* 诚然..^1.\n操控之冠会带来折磨.../",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_195_0": "* 然而^1，此生物定能感到慰藉.../",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_196_0": "* 即在其见证汝等\n领受更多折磨之时！！/%",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_397_0": "* 它又过来咯！",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_607_0": "跳着看",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_609_0": "鞠躬",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_611_0": "苏西的点子",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_277_0": "* 国王跳棋 - 攻击 9 防御 3\n* 注意它的必杀技^1：飞将攻击！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_278_0": "* （别忘了要让皇冠掉下来。）/%",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_282_0": "* 国王跳棋 - 攻击 9 防御 3\n* 它处于控制下^1，所以在攻击你们！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_283_0": "* （不过它没被控制时^1，\n也会攻击的吧...？）/%",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_510_0": "* 苏西^1？你想要行动^1？\n唔^1，你有什么点子？/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_512_0": "* 唔..^1. 该怎么说呢。/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_513_0": "* 我可能需要... \n* 你来帮我执行这个计划。/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_515_0": "* 没问题^1，苏西！\n* 我会帮你的！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_516_0": "\\E0* 你想为之前的事对它\n表达歉意^1，对吧？/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_518_0": "* 不^1，我要你站稳了别动。/%",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_578_0": "* 克里斯^1！\n我们得把皇冠给弄下来！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_579_0": "* 帮我用利艾尔斯把皇冠砸掉！/%",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_489_0": "* 按",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_489_1": "来确定角度！",
  "obj_throwralsei_slash_Step_0_gml_26_0": "* 按",
  "obj_throwralsei_slash_Step_0_gml_26_1": "来决定力度！",
  "obj_ralseithrown_slash_Collision_154b9139_8c0d_44d5_b8de_0f03c1a8096c_gml_6_0": "* 皇冠松动了许多！/%",
  "obj_ralseithrown_slash_Collision_154b9139_8c0d_44d5_b8de_0f03c1a8096c_gml_29_0": "* 皇冠松动了一点！/%",
  "obj_ralseithrown_slash_Step_0_gml_23_0": "* 打偏了！/%",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_487_0": "丢",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_349_0": "* 啊！？\n* 几乎没有作用啊！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_350_0": "\\E1* 我们要怎么把皇冠弄掉呢...？/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_352_0": "* ..^1.唔。/%",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_359_0": "* 还是没有作用啊！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_360_0": "\\E6* 我们该怎么做啊^1，克里斯...？/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_362_0": "* ..^1.嘿。/%",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_369_0": "* 有时坚持就是胜利^1，克里斯！！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_370_0": "\\E6* 虽然很难^1，但我们能做到的！！/",
  "obj_checkers_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_372_0": "* 嘿你们这些家伙！！/%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_260_0": "\\E6* .../",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_261_0": "\\E1* .../%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_274_0": "\\E5* 天哪^1，精彩！\n* 着实精彩！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_275_0": "\\E3* 吾早已知晓汝等能做到^1！\n汝等乃是伟大的英雄^1，\n毋庸置疑！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_276_0": "\\E6* 汝瞧^1，刚刚这不过是.../",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_277_0": "\\E3* 对汝等之能力的\n友好测试而已！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_278_0": "\\E2* 但汝等已胜利^1！\n现今^1，已无障碍能够阻挡\n汝等之路！/",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_279_0": "\\E5* 凭吾^1，这副身板^1，\n连给汝等当绊脚石都不够格！/%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0": "* 可是你-%%",
  "obj_rurus_checker_event_slash_Step_0_gml_306_0": "\\E3* 愿幸运与汝同在^1。英雄们！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_695_0": "* （横幅^1。似乎经历了某种战斗...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_698_0": "* （宝藏。）\n* （闪烁着贪婪的光芒。）/%",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_169_0": "* （一个王座。）\n* （似乎在战斗中受损了...）/%",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_173_0": "* （金银财宝。）\n* （闪耀着贪婪的光芒。）/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_72_0": "* 嘿^1，兰瑟在那边...！/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_110_0": "* 父亲！/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_112_0": "* 兰瑟^1，我的儿子。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_113_0": "* 你有没有遵照我的命令^1，\n结果了那些光之民？/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_115_0": "* 还..^1. 还没有^1，但-但是.../",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_116_0": "\\E3* 我做了更棒的事！/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_117_0": "\\E2* 其实我们并不需要跟他们战斗！/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_118_0": "\\E3* 他们说可以跟你谈谈.../%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0": "* 他们还活着？/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_139_0": "* 是的^1，而且我觉得\n你会很喜欢他们的！/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_140_0": "\\E2* 其中有一位叫苏西^1，\n她很紫很强大.../",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_142_0": "* 他们现在在哪？/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_144_0": "* 唔.../%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_175_0": "* 喂。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_177_0": "* 很高兴见到你！/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_187_0": "* ..^1.兰瑟。\n* 兰瑟^1，我的儿子。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_189_0": "* ..^1.嗯^1，父亲？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_223_0": "* 还记得我对你说过什么吗？/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_225_0": "* 不..^1. 不要..^1.\n让自己陷得太深？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_251_0": "* 你失败了。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_252_0": "* 他们的多愁善感已经腐蚀了你的心灵。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_253_0": "* 你该放手了^1，兰瑟。\n* 他们根本就不在乎你。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_254_0": "* 他们来这里的唯一目的就是\n毁掉让我们引以为荣的喷泉。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_255_0": "* 他们^1，就是^1，人渣。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_257_0": "* 不..^1. 不^1，他们不是.../%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_285_0": "* 你说什么！？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_316_0": "* 放开他。/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_319_0": "* 哈哈哈哈.../",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_320_0": "* 你想让我放开他！？/",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_321_0": "* 那这样如何...？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_348_0": "* 除非你们认清自己的处境^1，\n一起跪下投降.../",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_349_0": "* 否则我就把他从这里丢下去\n摔得粉身碎骨！/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_363_0": "* 如何啊^1，光之民！？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_396_0": "* 苏西^1，别-别听他的^1，\n他会..^1. 他会.../%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_437_0": "* 现在看好了^1，兰瑟...！/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_471_0": "* 这就是和光之民交朋友的下场！/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_529_0": "* 什..^1. 什么！？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_543_0": "* 你..^1. 你这个叛徒...！\n* 给我回来...！/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_554_0": "* 好了^1，真是够了。/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_573_0": "* 你特么以为自己是谁啊？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_592_0": "* 呵呵呵... \n* 呵呵呵呵呵.../",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_593_0": "* 对于我的子民们来说^1，\n我是个英雄.../",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_594_0": "* ..^1.而对于你们？/%",
  "obj_kingcutscene_slash_Step_0_gml_636_0": "* 我是个坏蛋！！！/%",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_517_0": "* 国王拦住了去路！",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_665_0": "国王",
