  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2588_0": "\\E2* ..^1.真的吗^1？\n你这话是认真的^1？\n没有在开玩笑？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2589_0": "\\E6* ..^1.天哪^1，这样的话^1，\n也许我该试着跟她聊两句.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2590_0": "\\E8* 但-但假如我死掉了^1，\n我的葬礼可得你来掏钱^1，\n克里斯！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2591_0": "\\E6* （不过^1，说实话^1，\n如果她人真的很好^1，\n我恐怕也要激动得死掉吧...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2517_0": "\\E0* 嗨^1，克里斯！\n* 怎么了吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2538_0": "\\C4 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2542_0": "\\E2* 噢^1，我能再问点\n关于她的事吗！？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2543_0": "\\E3* 那个^1，你觉得她会不会^1，呃.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2544_0": "\\E8* （等-等一下^1，\n这个你肯定不会知道...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2595_0": "\\E2* 她干了什么^1？\n把你摔在锁柜上？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2596_0": "\\E7* 天哪^1，克里斯^1，我真的很抱歉^1。\n这也太过分了。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2597_0": "\\E3* 我..^1. 我还以为苏西她\n人其实不坏呢.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2598_0": "\\E6* 也许只是还没遇到哪个人\n能发现她的好。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2599_0": "\\E7* ..^1. 但她人真的很糟糕^1，\n是吗...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2600_0": "\\E7* 我很抱歉^1，克里斯..^1.\n你竟然会经历这种事情。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2601_0": "\\E4* 其实我在想..^1.\n你-你觉得我们有没有可能.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2602_0": "\\E3* 说服艾菲斯让我们交换搭档？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2603_0": "\\E2* 你知道的^1，\n这样你就不会被^1，唔.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2604_0": "\\E3* 摔在^1，锁柜上^1，之类的。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2605_0": "\\E8* （等等..^1. 我好像说得\n有些奇怪...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2609_0": "\\E2* 什么？\n* 她吃粉笔？？？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2610_0": "* 真..^1. 真的吗...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2611_0": "\\E8* 等等^1！\n你不会是在戏弄我吧^1，克里斯？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2612_0": "\\E3* 就-就像你那次告诉我Ice-E\n是真实存在的^1，还会吃小孩.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2613_0": "\\E8* 结果你就被蒂斯用球棒敲头^1，\n敲到不再撒谎为止。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2614_0": "\\E2* ..^1. 啊^1？\n你说的是真的^1？\n没在开玩笑？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2615_0": "\\E5* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2616_0": "\\E0* 唔^1，那样的话..^1.\n她喜欢吃哪种颜色的粉笔？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2617_0": "\\E4* 还有^1，你觉得她喜欢吃\n细的还是粗的粉笔...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2618_0": "\\E8* （等等^1，给她做份粉笔便当\n这种主意可能还是太蠢了...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2622_0": "\\E2* 不是吧^1，克里斯^1？\n我可经常有帮你诶！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2623_0": "\\E8* 你至少给我一点点情报吧！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2624_0": "\\E2* 比如说^1，\n她-她喜欢金属乐吗！？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2625_0": "\\E2* 她真的是纯肉食动物吗！？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2626_0": "\\E2* 她..^1. 她的外套下面\n真的有条尾巴吗！？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2627_0": "\\E3* 还有^1，那个..^1. 那个... /",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2628_0": "\\E4* 抱歉^1，克里斯^1，这些事请和我\n一点关系都没有^1，对吧...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2629_0": "\\E8* （糟了^1，我说太多了...）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2559_0": "\\E1* 呃..^1. 克里斯...^1？\n你今天是怎么了？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2560_0": "\\E5* 你平时不这么..^1. 健谈的。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2561_0": "\\E4* 噢^1！我不是故意说得像是\n你有什么毛病一样啦。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2562_0": "\\E4* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2563_0": "\\E2* 呃^1，克里斯^1，出什么事了吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2564_0": "\\E3* 为什么你会去医院\n看望我爸爸...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2565_0": "\\E2* 虽然我知道他会很高兴^1，\n但是..^1. 呃.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2566_0": "\\E4* 天哪^1，抱歉^1，克里斯^1。\n就当我什么都没说吧！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2552_0": "\\E2* ..^1.啊^1？你问我为什么\n不去找妈妈要钥匙？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2553_0": "\\E3* 我..^1. 我是说^1，\n唔..^1. 那个..^1. 你也知道，/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2554_0": "\\E4* 她不喜欢我在她工作的时候\n打扰她。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2555_0": "\\E0* 别担心^1，好吗^1？\n我去凯迪家就行。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2570_0": "\\E0* 替我向艾利问好^1，克里斯！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1338_0": "* （一扇富丽堂皇的门。）\n* （看样子被锁住了。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1345_0": "* 嗷^1，克里斯^1，那个^1，\n如果你想进来坐坐.../",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1346_0": "\\E4* 我们的猫洞^1，那个^1，\n永远向你敞开.../%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1350_0": "* （各种猫类垃圾在房子里堆积如山。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1351_0": "* （看起来有点“狸”乱...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1355_0": "* （一个坏掉的烤架。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1356_0": "* （..^1.闻起来像烧焦的猫粮。）/%",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_196_0": "* （这是你妈妈的面包车。）/%",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0": "\\E0* 欢迎回家^1，亲爱的！/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_107_0": "\\E9* 今天和朋友玩得开心吗？/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0": "\\E0* 顺便一提^1，\n我刚烤好了一个派.../",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_109_0": "\\E0* 如果你现在上床睡觉^1，\n等你睡醒它就凉下来了。/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_110_0": "\\E3* ..^1.但这次可别再全吃光了^1，\n好吗？/%",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_91_0": "\\E0* 又回来了^1？天哪^1，\n你今天可真是精力充沛呀。/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_92_0": "\\E4* 如果你在早上起床的时候\n也有这种劲头就好啦。/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_93_0": "\\E9* 毕竟你哥哥再也不能\n背着你上学了。/%",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_71_0": "\\E1* 克里斯...^1？为什么你一直\n在家门口进进出出的？/",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_72_0": "\\E4* 你想让我装个旋转门吗？/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3026_0": "* 克里斯^1？\n怎么了^1，亲爱的？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3027_0": "\\C4 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3021_0": "\n我",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3022_0": "\n艾斯利尔",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3023_0": "  派",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3024_0": "花",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3025_0": "没事",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1559_0": "\\E0* 克里斯^1，亲爱的^1，\n你已经长这么大了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1560_0": "\\E9* 过不了多久你也要去\n上大学了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2510_0": "\\E1* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1562_0": "\\E9* 还记不记得你小时候.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1563_0": "\\E8* 问我们你什么时候才会长角？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1564_0": "\\E0* 于是我们去买了个\n带着一对小红角的发箍。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1565_0": "\\E4* 哈^1，你戴了好几个月^1！\n它后来哪去了？/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3063_0": "\\E8* 噢^1，克里斯...^1？\n花^1？给妈妈的...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3064_0": "\\E9* 我好开心.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3065_0": "\\E9* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3066_0": "\\E5* 这些花是他给的^1，对吧。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3035_0": "\\E1* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3068_0": "\\E0* 呃^1，好吧^1，别担心^1，\n克里斯^1，我会.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3069_0": "\\E5* ..^1.找个地方放起来的。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3055_0": "\\E1* 克里斯^1，现在只有我们两人\n住在这里了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3056_0": "\\E9* 总觉得..^1. 有点寂寞呢^1，\n不是吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3057_0": "\\E0* 但好在^1，一起品尝一份\n刚做好的热腾腾的派，/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3058_0": "\\E9* 对于缓解这种情绪而言\n再合适不过了。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3059_0": "\\E5* ..^1.当然了^1，\n前提是我得能吃到。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3043_0": "\\E9* 还记得以前你和艾斯利尔玩的\n那个电子游戏吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3044_0": "\\E1* 叫什么名字来着...^1？\n超级明星大乱斗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3045_0": "\\E0* 他从很小的时候^1，\n就非常喜欢里面那只绿色蜥蜴。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3046_0": "\\E9* 我们甚至给他开了一个\n以此为主题的生日派对。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3047_0": "\\E0* 你爸爸把所有的蛋\n都涂上了斑点作为装饰.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3048_0": "\\E9* 噢^1，你哥哥可喜欢了...！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3049_0": "\\E5* 可是第二天^1，\n你爸爸把它们全煮了当早餐吃。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3050_0": "\\E8* 结果你哥哥哭了好久.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3051_0": "\\E4* 从那以后^1，他就恨透了那本\n介绍吃绿色的蛋的书！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3077_0": "\\E1* 克里斯^1，你今晚可能得\n早点上床睡觉了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3078_0": "* 你看起来像换了个人似的。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2661_0": "* （这是你的床。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2662_0": "* （如果你回去睡觉，\n\\cY可能会错过很多重要的事情\\cW。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2640_0": "* （真的要上床睡觉吗？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2670_0": "\n睡！！！",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2671_0": "\n不睡！！！",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2639_0": "* （如果你上床睡觉^1，\n本章节的旅途将会结束。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2663_0": "* （真的要上床睡觉吗？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2641_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2635_0": "\n睡觉",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2435_0": "\n不行",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2657_0": "\n睡觉",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2648_0": "* （你决定上床睡觉。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2652_0": "* （你决定稍后再睡。）/%",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_13_0": "当那光芒在凋落",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_19_0": "当那光芒在凋落",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_33_0": "暗影将视野淹没",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_54_0": "曾经熟知的场所",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_70_0": "如梦般扑朔",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_89_0": "灵魂深处仍有光",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0": "灵魂深处仍有光",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_113_0": "以真相照亮寒霜",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_131_0": "黑暗中  诺言心底回响",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0": "黑暗中  诺言心底回响",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_174_0": "不要忘  有我在你身旁",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_180_0": "不要忘  有我在你身旁",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_21_0": "三角符文",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_22_0": "第1章",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_24_0": "by Toby Fox",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_40_0": "（怀旧风配色及菜单美工, 边框）",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_95_0": "好人汉化组 策划＆程序",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_96_0": "好人Ⅲ[Lyra]",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_98_0": "汉化翻译[2018]",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_99_0": "yig^1，stargazy^1，米粒^1，Wiike\nJH^1，瑶铃^1，一瓶洋酒^1，田澄\n凤凰山芭蕉^1，好人Ⅲ[Lyra]",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_38_0": "主美术, 动画师, 修正",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_39_0": "（背景, 地面世界, 战斗）",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_42_0": "Temmie Chang",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_59_0": "兰瑟, 方钻, 心桃",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_60_0": "三头草, 国王, 小丑魔",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_61_0": "角色原创设计",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_64_0": "Kanotynes",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_119_0": "Don't Forget(人声版)",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_120_0": "钢琴演奏＆歌手",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_121_0": "Laura Shigihara",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_136_0": "服饰＆配色协助",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0": "配色协助",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_138_0": "Gigi DG",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_152_0": "特别鸣谢",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_153_0": "Chess (支持)",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_187_0": "未完待续",
  "obj_credits_slash_Step_0_gml_188_0": "第2章",
  "scr_itemuse_slash_scr_itemuse_gml_222_0": "* （你试着拨打电话。）",
  "obj_darkphone_event_slash_Step_0_gml_42_0": "* 但似乎完全打不通。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2748_0": "* 呃嘿嘿^1，钥匙来啦^1，钥匙来啦。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2749_0": "* 只差一步就可以让美妙绝伦的狂欢\n重获自由啦！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2750_0": "* 你该不会还想着置身事外吧？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2664_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2744_0": "\n使用钥匙",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2745_0": "\n不使用",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2765_0": "* （你把钥匙放在门前。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2770_0": "* 你早就已经无法回头啦^1！\n你别无选择！/%",
  "obj_event_room_slash_Step_0_gml_163_0": "* （钥匙创造了一扇门。）/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_59_0": "* 呃嘿嘿！\n* 来客人了^1，来客人了！\n* 我们总算可以玩了^1，痛快地玩！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_60_0": "* 这还没完^1，陪你们玩完之后^1，\n我还可以跟所有人一起玩下去^1，所有人！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_62_0": "* 那^1，我们究竟是要玩什么...？/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_64_0": "\\TJ* 哦^1，只不过是个\n小小的数字游戏而已。/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_140_0": "* 只要你们的HP统统掉到0^1，就输啦！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_142_0": "* 原来你想玩的就是\n这种游戏^1，嗯...？/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_143_0": "\\E2* 既然这样^1，我可要警告你.../%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_175_0": "* 你这是在老虎头上拔毛。/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_192_0": "* 呃嘿嘿^1！两虎相斗^1！ \n我可绝不会错过这等好戏！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_193_0": "* 好了^1，好了！！\n* 让游戏开始吧！！/%",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_384_0": "* 让游戏开始吧！",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_562_0": "小丑魔",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_358_0": "查看",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_579_0": "单足旋转",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_580_0": "无常\n混沌",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_585_0": "催眠",
  "scr_monstersetup_slash_scr_monstersetup_gml_586_0": "使其\n疲惫",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_158_0": "* 天旋地转^1，地转天旋。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_159_0": "* 自由的气息在空气中迸发。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_160_0": "* 小丑魔发出常人无法理解的狂笑。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_161_0": "* 仿佛一阵旋风。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0": "* 闻起来像混沌。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_237_0": "* 小丑魔 \n* 没有击败这个敌人的有效战术^1。\n祝你好运！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_35_0": "混沌^1，混沌^1，\n\n有本事就\n来抓我啊！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_36_0": "我们来玩\n转圈圈游戏\n好不好嘛？",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_37_0": "这就是我对\n你们这些罪人\n的一片心意！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_38_0": "哈^1，哈^1，\n一起来玩\n恶魔飞刀吧。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_39_0": "哔哔^1，\n一起来骑\n旋转木马吧。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_40_0": "嘿嘿^1，\n玩得尽兴吗！^1？\n那就在花丛中\n起舞吧！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_41_0": "红心^1，\n方块^1，\n我无所不能！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_42_0": "是谁让四周\n转来转去的？",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_43_0": "你们这群小屁孩\n还真能硬撑！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_44_0": "呜哈^1！\n我从来没\n这么开心^1，\n开心！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_45_0": "我的心里\n有个无比幸福的\n美人儿！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_46_0": "连恶魔飞刀也\n咧开嘴在笑！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_47_0": "太刺激了..^1.\n我承受不住了！！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_48_0": "就到这里啦^1，\n我的小伙伴们^1！\n拜拜咯！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_49_0": "够了！^1！\n你们这群小鬼头\n让我累得不轻！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_50_0": "逗你玩的！^1！\n接招吧^1！\n终极混沌！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_56_0": "一片混沌^1，\n混沌！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_56_1": "少来啦^1，不就是\n普普通通的\n混沌嘛。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_57_0": "我无所不能！！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_58_0": "我可是\n不死之身！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_58_1": "弹幕\n席卷着\n烈焰！！！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_59_0": "至高无上的\n快乐！！！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_247_0": "* 克里斯旋转身体！\n* 小丑魔又变得【疲惫】了一些^1，\n然后...！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_272_0": "* 某种事情发生了！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_276_0": "* 什么啊！\n* 只不过是效果音而已！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_284_0": "* 小丑魔感到无比自在！\n* 小丑魔的防御降低了！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_290_0": "* 这下惨了^1！\n下一次的攻击会变得更疼！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0": "* 一片寂静！\n* 舞步保护着队伍！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_310_0": "* 什么啊！\n* 只不过是只没用的鸟！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_314_0": "* 令人感到有些舒适！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_320_0": "* 所有人的HP被重新分配了！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_373_0": "* 小丑魔的下一次行动威力提升！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_379_0": "* 完美的10分！/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_387_0": "\n* 小丑魔看起来精疲力尽了！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_400_0": "* 利艾尔斯吟唱着什么！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_401_0": "* 苏西旋转着什么东西！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_402_0": "* 克里斯用诡异的目光凝视着对手！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_403_0": "\n* 小丑魔的下一次攻击变弱了！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_404_0": "\n* 小丑魔变得更加【疲惫】了！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_405_0": "\n* 小丑魔变得更加【疲惫】了！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_406_0": "\n* 小丑魔看起来精疲力尽了！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_163_0": "* 小丑魔看起来精疲力尽了...？",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_164_0": "* 混沌炸弹已经为你准备完毕。",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_165_0": "* 某种可怕的事物正在逼近！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_166_0": "* 小丑魔开始竭尽全力！",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_167_0": "* 小丑魔已经彻底虚脱了！",
  "DEVICE_FAILURE_slash_Step_0_gml_10_0": "\\M0 看来你已经到达了^6\n \n    一个结局。/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_201_0": "好了好了^1，\n你们说服我了！！/%",
  "DEVICE_FAILURE_slash_Step_0_gml_28_0": "\\M0      你还想再试\n       一次吗？",
  "DEVICE_FAILURE_slash_Step_0_gml_32_0": "\\M0   你还想坚持下去吗？",
  "DEVICE_FAILURE_slash_Step_0_gml_68_0": "     那么^1，未来\n   掌握在你的手中。",
  "DEVICE_FAILURE_slash_Step_0_gml_103_0": "\\M0       那么^5，\n   笼罩世界的黑暗^5 \n    将永不消散。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1274_0": "* （你敲了敲警察局的门。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1308_0": "* （...）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1276_0": "* （有人靠近了窗户。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1281_0": "* （警察看样子没什么干劲...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1266_0": "* （前面的路被警用胶带封锁了。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1267_0": "* （胶带上只写着“嘎啊啊啊！！！”）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1097_0": "* 市长的领袖气质几乎为零。\n* 不对^1，不如说是负数吧。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1098_0": "* 不过她工作奋进政绩斐然^1，\n所以向来不会树敌。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1099_0": "* 这就是政治\n* ..^1. 的话就有鬼了。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1103_0": "* 市长不光自己很冷淡^1，\n她还会把自己办公室的空调开到最冷。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1104_0": "* 令我一个劲打寒颤...\n* 这就是..^1. 政治的感觉吗？/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1163_0": "* （一棵小松树。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1166_0": "* （一把椅子。）\n* （它可能也想投身政治。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1158_0": "* （这个小镇的图画。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1081_0": "* 不好意思^1，不好意思。\n* 市长现在公务繁忙。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1082_0": "* 如果你想见她的话^1，\n就去搞些大乱子出来吧。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1086_0": "* 不好意思^1，不好意思。\n* 你是来投诉你的老师的吗？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1087_0": "* 如果你不喜欢她的话^1，\n就请去怪你妈妈雇了她吧。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1068_0": "* 嘿^1，小不点。\n* 就你也能有事找市长谈话？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1069_0": "* 你是零花钱太少了？\n* 糖吃太多了？\n* 还是飞盘掉水里了？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1070_0": "* 嘿^1，小不点.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1071_0": "* 那种事你该去找警察。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1074_0": "* 怎么着^1？\n叫我别用对“小孩”的口气对你讲话^1？\n可以啊.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1075_0": "* 你如果想找个人帮你换尿布的话^1，\n就去找警察吧。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2150_0": "* 克里斯..^1. \n能在这里遇到你还真是个惊喜。\n* 况且还是上学的日子。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2151_0": "* 你现在这个时候过来\n肯定有什么原因吧。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2152_0": "* 我^1，埃尔文神父^1，殷切地希望... \n* 如果你有任何精神负担的话^1，\n请一定要^1，向我倾诉。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2146_0": "\n果汁",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2147_0": "\n没事",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2159_0": "* 克里斯^1，如果想喝我们的“奇葩”果汁^1，\n你就应该来参加礼拜。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2160_0": "* 我们的唱诗班自从你哥哥离开后\n音色就稍显不够丰满了。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2161_0": "* 克里斯^1，如果你能来和我们一起唱\n就再好不过了。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2162_0": "* 哪怕只是随便参与一下，/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2163_0": "* 也总比一门心思想着喝果汁来得好。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2167_0": "* 我明白了。\n* 希望终有一天你能寻找到\n想要倾诉的话语。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2168_0": "* 愿天使之力照亮你的前路。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1145_0": "* 塞拉\n* 谨以此卡拉OK麦克风纪念勇敢的歌手/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1141_0": "* 穆特勒\n* 谨以此巨型骨头纪念族群的领袖/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1137_0": "* 雪玉龙\n* 谨以此如雪美玉纪念伟大的母亲/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1134_0": "* 葛森\n* 著名历史学家^1，作家^1，教师/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_717_0": "* （葛森·爆烈纪念长椅）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_718_0": "* “纵观写作一生^1，\n不知我有多少绝妙文思自梦泉涌。”/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_719_0": "* “在这儿稍事休息吧^1。\n若有人问起--你就说是在写作！”/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_51_0": "* 给我加冰！\n* 给我加冰^1，老板！！！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1198_0": "* 好的^1，两位小姐点的是^1，\n一份可丽饼^1，一份肉桂拿铁.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1199_0": "* 两份兔兔芭菲^1，\n还有..^1. 一块柴火...？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1202_0": "* 那么^1，柴火要做成几分熟的？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1212_0": "* 我说^1，记不记得咱俩曾经\n翘了第一堂课跑到这里来？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1213_0": "* 你是没什么事^1，\n可差点害我留了一级.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1214_0": "* 不过^1，这里的可丽饼\n值得为之疯狂^1！\n犯点小错更能使美食增色！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1217_0": "* 我说^1，当时要不是咱俩\n拿剩下的食物收买葛森^1，\n我绝对死得要多惨有多惨.../%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_67_0": "* 我喜欢这里女服务员的气质。\n* 没准我也应该来应聘.../",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_68_0": "* ..^1.还是算了^1，端茶倒水可不是\n适合火元素干的活。/",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_69_0": "* 我要是紧张起来^1，\n会让冰都融化掉的。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_72_0": "* 那假如我只负责送热咖啡呢？\n* 也不成^1，恐怕我得惹上官司.../%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1237_0": "* 冰狼不喜欢把冰加在饮料里。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1238_0": "* 冰狼喜欢把冰.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1239_0": "* ..^1.当饮料来喝！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1243_0": "* 冰狼也喜欢\n以冰块为原型的吉祥物。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1226_0": "* 见到我这高耸入云的身躯^1，\n你一定很好奇我隐藏着什么秘密.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1227_0": "* 我的秘密就是^1，\n我把吃剩的煎饼全塞进这顶大帽子里了。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1231_0": "* 呼！\n* 我可爱死煎饼了！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1151_0": "* 嗨！\n* 有阵子没来了^1，亲。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1153_0": "* 我还记得^1，\n在每周日的礼拜之后.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1154_0": "* 你们全家都会过来光顾^1，\n品尝当天的特别菜品。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1155_0": "* 当然了^1，也发生了不少事^1，\n再之后呢.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1156_0": "* 你们就... \n* 不再全家一块来了。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1157_0": "* 不过每当周日^1，\n你和你哥哥还是会过来。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1158_0": "* 他会给你点一杯热巧克力.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1159_0": "* 然后你们两人就坐在\n角落里的那张桌子旁边.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1160_0": "* ..^1.把气哈在窗玻璃上画画。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1128_0": "* .../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1162_0": "* 你一定特别想念他^1，对吧？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1163_0": "* ..^1.来^1，尝尝这个？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1164_0": "* （你得到了热巧克力。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1165_0": "* 算我请的^1，亲。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1172_0": "* ..^1. 那个^1，我想请你喝杯\n热巧克力来着.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1173_0": "* ..^1. 可是你似乎拿不下东西了。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1174_0": "* 放轻松^1，好吗^1，亲？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1145_0": "* 这个时候就别太见外了^1，\n好吗^1，亲？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1161_0": "* .../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1119_0": "\\E1* 你还活着。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1120_0": "\\E0* .../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1121_0": "\\E2* 好样的。/",

  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1376_0": "* .../",

  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1130_0": "\\E0* 规定。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_1136_0": "* 呃^1，我们要点一份今天的特别菜品^1，\n另外你们有可食用的小亮片吗...？/",

  "obj_battlecontroller_slash_Step_0_gml_40_0": "* 你胜利了！\n* 获得了~1EXP和~2D$。/%",
  "obj_battlecontroller_slash_Draw_0_gml_171_0": "% TP",
  "obj_battlecontroller_slash_Draw_0_gml_280_0": "% TP",
  "obj_classscene_slash_Step_0_gml_298_0": "\\FN\\TN\\E1* 唔^1，储物间里应该\n还有一盒.../",
  "obj_classscene_slash_Step_0_gml_299_0": "\\E0* 你要我来帮你 - %",
  "obj_classscene_slash_Step_0_gml_339_0": "\\Ta\\Fa\\E6* 好-好主意^1，诺艾尔！\n* 苏西^1，既-既然你是\n最晚到的.../",
  "obj_classscene_slash_Step_0_gml_301_0": "\\E7* Can you go get that for me...?/",
  "obj_classscene_slash_Step_0_gml_341_0": "\\FS\\TS\\E0* .../",
  "obj_classscene_slash_Step_0_gml_342_0": "* ..^1.随便。/%%",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_11_0": "善良的嘴",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_12_0": "愤怒的嘴",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_13_0": "聪明的嘴",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_17_0": "Nice to\nmeet you!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_18_0": "去死^1！\n去死^1！\n去死！",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_19_0": "请别理\n他们。",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_26_0": "I want the\nfluffy one!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_27_0": "No, that\none's MINE!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_28_0": "(He's\nboring...)",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_32_0": "Where's\nMr. Fluffy?",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_33_0": "YOU must\nhave\nscared him!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_34_0": "(Who\ncares?)",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_40_0": "I'm the\noldest!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_41_0": "WHAT!?\nI am!!!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_42_0": "We're\nthe same\nage...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_47_0": "今天天气\n真不错。",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_48_0": "胡说^1！\n明明糟透了！",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_49_0": "你们两个\n别吵了...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_61_0": "The 国王\nis great!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_62_0": "He's\nTERRIBLE!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_63_0": "你们两个\n别吵了...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_67_0": "An angel\nis watching\nus.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_68_0": "You BELIEVE\nthat\ngarbage?",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_69_0": "Please\nstop, you\ntwo...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_73_0": "I wanna\neat a\nfootball.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_74_0": "Sports!\nMy favorite\nfood!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_75_0": "Oh!\nI love you\ntwo!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_86_0": "Lightners\ndeserve\nrespect.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_87_0": "Hell no!\nThey can\nall die!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_88_0": "你们两个\n别吵了...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_92_0": "Oh, oh! That\nboy is ever\nso cute!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_93_0": "So fluffy!\nI want to\npet him!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_94_0": "HIM???\n..^1. err,\nsure.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_95_0": "(What\nabout the\ngirl..?)",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_98_0": "Oh, oh!\nI want a\n甜甜 boy.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_99_0": "Someone\nNICE, like\nme!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_100_0": "..^1.\nSure,\nI guess.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_105_0": "I use a\ngamepad to\naim!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0": "IDIOT!\nMouse and\nkeyboard!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_107_0": "你们两个\n别吵了...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_117_0": "I love\nthe smell\nof trees.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_118_0": "Oh!\nMe too!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_119_0": "Pollen\nmakes me..^1.\nUh, sure!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_123_0": "A ghost\ntold me I\nwas stupid.",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0": "That was me,\nyou idiot!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_125_0": "你们两个\n别吵了...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_130_0": "Our favorite\nvideo game\nis...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_131_0": "Shut up!!\nThey'll make\nfun of us!!!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_132_0": "你们两个\n别吵了...",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_139_0": "Aww, he\nMADE that!?\nSo caring!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_140_0": "It's SOOO\ncute!\nI want it!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_141_0": "(Isn't it\na bit..^1.\nchildish?)",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_146_0": "Ouchy!\nThat hurts!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0": "Suck it up,\nidiot!",
  "obj_clubsenemy_old_slash_Step_0_gml_148_0": "(We're\nfighting\nagain!?)",

  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_87_0": "* 心桃首领悄无声息地挪动身体。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_88_0": "* 心桃首领没有表露出一丝感情。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_89_0": "* 心桃首领低声说着模糊不清的字句。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_90_0": "* 心桃首领的心思令人难以捉摸。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_91_0": "* 闻起来像一个孤独的吻。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_92_0": "* 心桃首领的心跳变慢了。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_93_0": "* 心桃首领的心跳发生了紊乱。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_94_0": "* 心桃首领的心跳漏了一拍。",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_135_0": "* 心桃首领 - 攻击 8 防御 0\n* 它学会了隐藏自己的情感..^1. \n这算是种坚强吗？/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_144_0": "* 你对心桃首领调情。\n* 效果非常好。/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_159_0": "* 你指示苏西对敌人调情！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_161_0": "* .../",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0": "\\E1* 那那那那绝对没门。/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_164_0": "* 噢^1，苏西^1，\n你不知道怎么做也没关系的！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_166_0": "* 什么^1？\n闭嘴^1，这根本不是问题！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_168_0": "* ..^1.你确定吗？/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_170_0": "* 行吧^1，机灵鬼^1！\n我就做给你看^1！瞧好了！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_171_0": "\\E0* 咳。/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_179_0": "* 你指示苏西对敌人调情！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_181_0": "* 没门^1。这事让利艾尔斯去干吧。/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_183_0": "* 如果实在没办法的话..^1. \n也只能这样了！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_184_0": "\\E0* 心桃^1，你的美貌..^1.\n简直是闭月羞花。/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_185_0": "\\E8* 你的头发就像瀑布一般.../",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_186_0": "\\E1* ..^1.啊^1，等等^1，你有头发吗^1，\n那是.../%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_192_0": "* 你指示苏西对敌人调情！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_194_0": "* 天啊^1，克里斯！！^1！\n我做不到^1！你行你上！/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_200_0": "* 你对敌人调情^1。成功了！\n（苏西一点儿忙都没帮上。）/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_241_0": "* 那么^1，呃.../",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_242_0": "* 你..^1. 经常来这里吗？/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_251_0": "* （心桃首领受不了尴尬离开了...）/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_253_0": "* 喂^1，回来^1！\n我要继续和你调情！！！/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_256_0": "* （心桃首领受不了尴尬离开了...）/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_258_0": "* 哎呀^1！等等！！/",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_260_0": "* 怎么样^1，没那么容易吧！？/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Step_0_gml_276_0": "* 你说了些甜言蜜语^1。敌人身陷情网！/%",
  "obj_headhathy_slash_Draw_0_gml_6_0": "（疲惫）",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_48_0": "克里斯",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_49_0": "苏西",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_50_0": "利艾尔斯",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_114_0": "TESTOBJECT",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_158_0": "i1",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_169_0": "* i3",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_176_0": "\\FR* i4",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_179_0": "\\FS* i5 \\f1",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_182_0": "\\T1\\F0* i6./%",
  "obj_initializer_slash_Create_0_gml_183_0": "\\FT* i7！/%",
  "obj_interactablesolid_slash_Other_10_gml_2_0": "* 你看得见我...？/%",
  "obj_joker_slash_Step_0_gml_407_0": "/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_294_0": "* 哈哈哈。\n* 太尽兴了！！！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_295_0": "* 你们很快^1，很快^1，很强^1，很强。/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0": "* 但还有远比你们更快^1，更强的\n事物存在。/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_297_0": "* 骑士的魔爪正在逼近。/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_298_0": "* 不久之后^1，当“女王”归来^1，\n深渊中传出地狱的呼啸时.../",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_299_0": "* 光之民们^1，你们阻止得了吗？/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_300_0": "* 呃嘿嘿！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_301_0": "* 无论如何^1，闹剧永不终结^1，\n混沌永世长存...！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_302_0": "* 光之民们！\n* 从你们身处的狭小囚笼里！！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_303_0": "* 带走我^1，然后倾泻出你们\n最极致的力量吧--！/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_307_0": "* 太有趣了！！！\n* 我好累！！！\n* 你们这群孩子真能闹腾！！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_308_0": "* 现在我要再睡上个100年了。/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_309_0": "* 可惜^1，你们无法享受如此美梦。/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_310_0": "* 不久之后^1，噩梦将在你们内心苏醒。/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_311_0": "* 从骑士魔爪的暗影中滋生.../",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_312_0": "* 光之民们^1，你们阻止得了吗？/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_313_0": "* 呃嘿嘿！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_314_0": "* 无论如何^1，闹剧永不终结^1，\n混沌永世长存...！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_315_0": "* 光之民们！\n* 从你们身处的狭小囚笼里！！/",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_316_0": "* 带走它^1，然后倾泻出你们\n最极致的力量吧！/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_344_0": "* （恶魔飞刀被放进了你的【武器】中。）/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_348_0": "* （房间外出现了一个奇怪的箱子...）/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_357_0": "* （小丑魔的尾巴被放进了\n你的【防具】中。）/%",
  "obj_jokerbattleevent_slash_Step_0_gml_361_0": "* （房间外出现了一个奇怪的箱子...）/%",

  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_80_0": "* Alright, which one do you want?/",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_82_0": "* Hahahah!! Hmmm.../%",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_103_0": "* Wait, you're buying it for me?/",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_105_0": "* You said you didn't eat anything earlier, right...?/",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0": "\\E2* It'd be annoying if you starved to death, y'know./",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0": "* Wow...!/",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_109_0": "* You're the best teammate ever, Purple Girl...!/%",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_237_0": "* 嘿^1！不许不从我们这里买东西！/",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_239_0": "* 听着笨蛋！\n* 这可是为了大义！/",
  "obj_lancerbakesale_event_slash_Step_0_gml_241_0": "* (克里斯 let's just buy one.)/%",

  "obj_monster1_slash_Step_0_gml_55_0": "* Line5",
  "obj_monster1_slash_Step_0_gml_56_0": "* Line6",
  "obj_monster1_slash_Step_0_gml_57_0": "* Line7",
  "obj_monster1_slash_Step_0_gml_75_0": "* Line8/%",
  "obj_monster1_slash_Step_0_gml_82_0": "Line9",
  "obj_monster1_slash_Step_0_gml_91_0": "* 苏西与克里斯施展了双重碎击！/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_10_0": "* 你脸上那是条疤^1，\n还是说你眼缝就这么大？/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_438_0": "* 呵^1，我的衣服肯定很好看。/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_440_0": "* 好^1！我已经做完了一个样板！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_442_0": "* 那不就是..^1. 一堆撕碎的毛毡吗？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_444_0": "* 求你能不能\n别表现得这么嫉妒一会儿？/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_470_0": "* 也在这个谜题卡关了吗？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_472_0": "* 我在安排时别跟我说话./",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_474_0": "* 我说^1，你怎么不像以前一样\n直接踏过那些尖刺呢...？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_476_0": "* 呵^1，你们已经要来解决了^1，\n我们又何苦呢？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_478_0": "* （哦^1，我还以为是因为我怕尖刺。）/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_480_0": "* 嘘～～～～！/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_489_0": "* 看到你们俩在这绞尽脑汁.../",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_490_0": "\\E8* 就像在学校里做小组作业一样^1，\n对不对？/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_492_0": "* 能不能不要乱搞？/%",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_500_0": "\\E2* 小心^1！我们在分头进行双线阴谋^1，\n阴谋速度加倍...！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_501_0": "\\E1* 我对自己进行了深入解析^1，\n发现了许多秘密！/",
  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_502_0": "\\E7* 比如..^1. 我的阴谋水平十分糟糕。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_11_0": "* 那道撕裂的伤痕就像是\n你的泪迹一样。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_48_0": "* 停-停下！\n* 你之前打伤我的地方还没好呢。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_49_0": "* 而且^1，我刚吃完^1，要是马上\n和你打的话会抽筋的。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_53_0": "* 你的城堡里有泳池吗？\n* 我在考虑要不要带我的可爱泳衣.../%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_57_0": "* 感觉我之前才在天上飞过.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_58_0": "* 难不成是梦...？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_186_0": "* 你对战斗有何疑惑？\n* 想不想知道关于TP的详情？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_187_0": "* 要是你还有不理解的地方.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_188_0": "* 我在西边的军团\n会帮你想起所有细节的。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_193_0": "* 你的朋友们无法独立\\cY行动\\cW^1，\n但他们可以帮你和平取胜。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_194_0": "* \\cG黑暗王子\\cW的\\cY安抚\\cW法术\n能够安全的把\\cB疲劳\\cW的敌人\n从战斗中撤离。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_195_0": "* 要是没有别的办法了的话^1，\n可以考虑使用\\cY道具\\cW。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_196_0": "* 看上去也许毫无用处的东西^1，\n效果也许会吓你一跳哦。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_200_0": "* 干嘛？\n* 我在这造梯子呢。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_201_0": "* 今天学到的是...\n* \\cR我在造梯子的时候离我远点！\\cW /",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_202_0": "* 是不是要给你来一场\\cR互动教学\\cW\n你才会\\cR离我远点\\cW？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_205_0": "* 什么？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_206_0": "* 是不是要给你来一场\\cR互动教学\\cW\n你才会\\cR离我远点\\cW？/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_214_0": "* \\cY防御\\cW不仅能\\cR减少所受伤害\\cW.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_215_0": "* 更能让你集中精神，\\cY回复TP\\cW^1。\n你需要\\cYTP\\cW才能施展\\cR法术\\cW！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_216_0": "* 所以请多利用\\cY防御\\cW！\n* \\cY防御\\cW然后施展\\cY法术\\cW！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_217_0": "* 还有^1，战斗结束时所有的残余\\cYTP\\cW\n都将\\cR转化为金钱\\cW！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_221_0": "* 靠近\\cY子弹\\cW很刺激对吧？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_222_0": "* 每当你靠近\\cY子弹\\cW^1，\n都会\\cR少量回复\\cW\\cYTP\\cW。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_223_0": "* 此外，\\cR靠近子弹\\cW有时能\\cR更快的\n结束敌人的攻击\\cW。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_224_0": "* 但这\\cR很危险\\cW。\n* 所以你不想尝试也没有关系。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_233_0": "* （这是一棵糖果树）\n* （上面成熟的糖果都已经被摘掉了。）/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_236_0": "* （这是一棵糖果树）\n* （上面成熟的糖果都已经被摘掉了。）/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_238_0": "* 算了吧^1，克里斯。\n* 没熟的糖果是酸的。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_240_0": "* What? Sour, 甜甜, meaty, bitter..^1. if it's candy, it's good!/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_242_0": "* Well, that's accepting of you.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_243_0": "\\E9* ..^1.等等，“肉的？”/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_248_0": "* 什么样的糖果才算是肉的？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_250_0": "* Y'know.\n* Whatever it's called.\n* Uhhh, jerky./",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_252_0": "* 肉干可不是糖果.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_254_0": "* Then why is it next to it in the store!?/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_428_0": "* 今天是特别的日子^2～\n* 可不是废话^2。\n* 一定程度上吧.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_429_0": "* 你知道今天是什么日子吗~^2？\n* 你最好知道。\n* 呃^1，要是你不知道也没关系.../%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_504_0": "* 这群\\cY鸟\\cW真是让我\\cY火大\\cW.../",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_505_0": "* 我才是正牌的   \\cY星之行者\\cW /%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_8_0": "* 痛苦便是原因。/%",
  "obj_npc_room_animated_slash_Other_10_gml_101_0": "* 啊^1，被打得落花流水的家伙们。\n* 真让人怀念啊。/%",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_8_0": "* 你无法理解这些符号是什么意思...\n* 也许是因为画得太难看了。/%",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_68_0": "* (心桃, in case you wanted to make us a birthday gift...)/",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_69_0": "* (My favorite things are trees, boys, and sports!)\n* (SIGNED, 三头草)/%",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_161_0": "* 这\\cY监狱\\cW真是让我\\cY火大\\cW.../",
  "obj_npc_sign_slash_Other_10_gml_162_0": "* 我是正牌的     \\cY星之行者\\cW /%",
  "obj_npc_托丽尔_slash_Other_10_gml_2_0": "* 你好啊！\n* 今天风和日丽^1，你感觉如何？/%",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Step_0_gml_32_0": "* 你以平静的口吻\n送别了~1。",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Step_0_gml_33_0": "* 你把~1放在地上，\n轻轻拍了拍它。",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Step_0_gml_35_0": "* 你把~1丢在地上，\n这正是它这样的垃圾\n应有的待遇。",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Step_0_gml_36_0": "* 你丢弃了~1。",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Step_0_gml_37_0": "* ~1被丢掉了。",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Step_0_gml_38_0": "/%",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Step_0_gml_41_0": "* 什么蛋？/%",

  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_37_0": "LV",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_39_0": "$",

  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_67_0": "LV",

  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_74_0": "铅笔",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_75_0": "万圣节铅笔",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_76_0": "幸运铅笔",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_77_0": "创可贴",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_80_0": "武器：",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_81_0": "防具：",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_82_0": "金钱：",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_91_0": "EXP：",
  "obj_overworldc_slash_Draw_0_gml_112_0": "升级需：",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_11_0": "Message\nA",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_12_0": "Message\nB",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_13_0": "Message\nC",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_14_0": "Message\nD",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_16_0": "WlyWlyWlyWly\nWlyWlyWlyWly\nWlyWlyWlyWly\nWlyWlyWlyWly",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_63_0": "* Placeholder Message A.",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_64_0": "* Placeholder Message B.",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_65_0": "* Placeholder Message C.",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_66_0": "* Placeholder Message D.",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_99_0": "A special\nscenario\noccurred!!/%",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_135_0": "* 敌人 - 攻击 1 防御 1\n* 我是你的敌人。/%",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_146_0": "* You warned the enemy.\n* It guarded from 苏西's attack./%",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0": "(Warned)",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_156_0": "* Its body was filled with a kind feeling./%",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_164_0": "* Its body will result in a kind feeling at the end of the combat./%",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_172_0": "* Its body will result in a speech after attack./%",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_180_0": "* Its body became tired./%",
  "obj_placeholderenemy_slash_Step_0_gml_181_0": "(Tired)",
  "obj_pushableblock_slash_Other_10_gml_61_0": "* (You haven't decided if you want to do the puzzle yet.)/%",
  "obj_pushableblock_slash_Other_10_gml_74_0": "* What!?\n* The puzzle!?/",
  "obj_pushableblock_slash_Other_10_gml_75_0": "\\E0* I thought you were on MY side, 克里斯./",
  "obj_pushableblock_slash_Other_10_gml_76_0": "\\E2* ..^1.等一下。\n* 那些箱子...！\n* 我懂了！/",
  "obj_pushableblock_slash_Other_10_gml_77_0": "* 等一下^1，克里斯!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_36_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_42_0": "* See that \\cRHEART\\cW, 克里斯?/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_43_0": "* That's a \\cRSOUL\\cW, the culmination of a HUMAN's being!/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_44_0": "* Not only does it represent one's WILL and COMPASSION.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_45_0": "* But it also has the power to DETERMINE FATE./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_46_0": "* When enemies attack, BULLETS appear./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_47_0": "* Please avoid them and protect your team's FATE!/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_48_0": "* Ready, 克里斯^2?\n* Let's try dodging!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_65_0": "* That's DEFENDING, 克里斯.\n* You'll recover TP and take less damage./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_66_0": "\\E8* It's not part of this lesson, though./%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_70_0": "* Gee, 克里斯!\n* You sure are good at defending!/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_71_0": "\\E8* I'm not attacking, you, though, so...\n* No need to defend!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_77_0": "* Ummm...\n* 克里斯?/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_78_0": "\\E8* There are no bullets, and you can't use TP.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_79_0": "\\E8* So, umm, maybe you could stop defending?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_86_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_96_0": "* You've got an item!\n* That's, um, great, 克里斯.../%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_107_0": "* W-wow, 克里斯!\n* That was an amazing attack!/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0": "\\E8* Have you done this before or something...?/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_112_0": "* Good job, 克里斯!\n* By the way, you'll do more damage.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_113_0": "\\E8* Pressing Z when the cursor is RIGHT IN the box on the left!/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_118_0": "* 克里斯!\n* You did it!!!/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_119_0": "\\E8* (I was really just about at my limit...)/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_121_0": "\\E1* Umm, anyway, let's move onto my favorite: \\cYACTING\\cW!/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_122_0": "\\E0* Selecting the ACT ICON will let you do all sorts of things./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_123_0": "\\E8* We'll even be able to get through battles without ATTACKing!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0": "* Select the ACT ICON and HUG the Dummy!",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_130_0": "* Ummm..^1. 克里斯?\n* You don't need to hit it anymore./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_131_0": "\\E8* I already know you're great at attacking!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0": "* Hey, 克里斯?\n* I know you like attacking, but.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_138_0": "\\E8* Did you know you can win without having to?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_144_0": "* .../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_145_0": "\\E1* 克里斯, could you, um, stop...?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_154_0": "* Oh, sorry, 克里斯!\n* I forgot to mention!\n* When you're ATTACKing.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_155_0": "\\E8* Press Z again when the cursor goes in the box!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_159_0": "* It's OK, 克里斯!\n* You'll get it!\n* Try again!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_160_0": "* Press Z when the white rectangle's in the blue box!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_161_0": "* Ummm..^1. you can press Z a lot, if it helps!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0": "* 克里斯...\n* Please try to press Z./%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_163_0": "* Ummm, 克里斯?\n* Can you see the white rectangle?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_164_0": "* You know rectangles?\n* They're like messed-up squares?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_168_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_173_0": "* Umm, why don't we try something else?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_174_0": "* Select the ACT ICON and HUG the Dummy!",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_187_0": "* .../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_188_0": "\\E8* Hey, 克里斯, I think I've, um.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_189_0": "\\E1* Reached the limits of what I can teach you today./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_190_0": "\\E0* Let's go find 苏西./%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_195_0": "* .../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_196_0": "* 克里斯, it's um.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_197_0": "\\E3* Really hard for me to teach when you're hitting me./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_198_0": "\\E8* Let's take a break and go find 苏西, OK?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_212_0": "* 克-克里斯！？/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_213_0": "\\E1* Y-you must have missed...\n* H..^1. Haha.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_218_0": "\\E3* W-wait, aren't you supposed to be ACTing!?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_222_0": "\\E3* A-anyway, now that you know how to attack.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_223_0": "\\E8* Let's try learning how to ACT, OK?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_224_0": "* Select the ACT ICON and HUG the Dummy!",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_231_0": "* 克-克里斯!?\n* D-did you miss again!?/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_232_0": "\\E1* .../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_233_0": "\\E2* Though, I mean, if you wanted to hit me, that's ok, too.../%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_288_0": "* 利艾尔斯 looks on expectedly.",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_334_0": "* Yipee!\n* You did it, 克里斯!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_343_0": "* O-oopsie..^2.\n* Was that too many?/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_344_0": "\\E8* Here, let's try just one!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_369_0": "* Yipee!\n* You did it, 克里斯!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_378_0": "* .../%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_399_0": "\\E8* L-look, 克里斯!\n* You dodged one!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_410_0": "* Now, let's talk about \\cYSELECTING COMMANDS\\cW./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_411_0": "* These ICONS will let you ISSUE COMMANDS to YOUR TEAM./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_412_0": "\\E0* The first ICON, THE SWORD, is the ATTACK COMMAND./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_413_0": "\\E1* Using it lets you, um...\n* Hurt people.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_414_0": "\\E8* ..^1. w-well, I guess we have to defend ourselves sometimes, right?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_427_0": "* Select the SWORD ICON to ATTACK the Dummy!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_447_0": "* 利艾尔斯 - AT 8 DF 12\n* The fluffy prince.../%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_464_0": "* You hug 利艾尔斯./%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_504_0": "* 克..^1. 克里斯!?/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_508_0": "* 克..^1. 克里斯！？/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_509_0": "\\E8* Ummm, I don't think, um.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_510_0": "* This is what you're supposed to be doing./",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_511_0": "\\E2* (But I don't really want to tell you to stop...)/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_516_0": "* 克里斯！？/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_517_0": "\\E2* Umm, if that's what you r-really want.../",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_518_0": "\\E8* Then that's a victory in my book!\n* You win!/%",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_575_0": "h/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_576_0": "h/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_577_0": "h/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_578_0": "h/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_579_0": "h/",
  "obj_ralseienemy_slash_Step_0_gml_580_0": "下个\n地狱见^1，\n废物们！/%",
  "obj_readable_slash_Other_10_gml_2_0": "* 你看得见我...？/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_126_0": "* （一块奶油糖肉桂派。）\n* （还很烫。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_140_0": "* 一个垃圾桶。\n* 不知为何^1，它散发的花香更加强烈了。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_571_0": "* （不能再拿了。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_575_0": "* （从星之行者的光晕中获得了$40。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_673_0": "* （他在树后面。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_675_0": "* （一棵树。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_682_0": "* （唔^1，这里没有一个男人。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_746_0": "* （只是些平平无奇的钱财^1，\n获得的渠道光明正大。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_766_0": "\\E4* 迷茫了...？\n* 恐慌了...？\n* 困惑了...？/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_767_0": "\\E2* 太好了！^1！哈哈哈！！！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_768_0": "\\E0* 身陷此举世无双之谜题^1，\n寸步难行吧...！！！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_772_0": "\\E3* 噫^1，汝等尚未破解吾之谜题？/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_773_0": "\\E2* 困窘^1，绝望^1，\n犹如蝼蚁黏在蟑螂板上\n无望挣扎.../",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_774_0": "\\E4* 啊..^1. 要我对你们大发慈悲\n也不是不可能.../",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_775_0": "\\E2* 只要你们肯向我下跪\n整整一百年！^1！哈哈哈！！！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_782_0": "\\E2* 咕哈哈哈..^1.\n直面此盖世无敌之谜题吧^1，\n蠕虫们！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_783_0": "\\E3* 这一次的难度^1，\n堪称旷古烁今！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_784_0": "\\E1* 百年后见^1，蝼蚁鼠辈们！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_788_0": "\\E4* 噢^1！此等绝望^1！\n噢^1，此等甜美的绝望！/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_789_0": "\\E2* 蠕动吧^1！蠕动于泥土之间^1，\n宛如濡湿之面条！/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_796_0": "* （哪里走...！）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_799_0": "* （它去迎接更美好的生活了...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_999_0": "* （你妈妈送来的问候卡片。）\n* （里面有签名。）/",
  "obj_savemenu_slash_Create_0_gml_7_0": "克里斯",
  "obj_savemenu_slash_Create_0_gml_43_0": "克里斯",
  "obj_savemenu_slash_Draw_0_gml_29_0": "LV",
  "obj_savemenu_slash_Draw_0_gml_33_0": "LV",
  "obj_savemenu_slash_Draw_0_gml_47_0": "保存",
  "obj_savemenu_slash_Draw_0_gml_48_0": "返回",
  "obj_savemenu_slash_Draw_0_gml_52_0": "已保存。",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_16_0": "* Then add a mustache over there.../",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_18_0": "* Hee hee, like this?/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_20_0": "* Haha! Yeah! Like that!/%",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_41_0": "* How's the scheming coming along, you two?/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_43_0": "* Hey, don't LOOK! We aren't done yet!/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_45_0": "* You're going to spoil it for yourselves!/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_47_0": "* C'mon, we're working hard on this!/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_49_0": "* Sorry! Sorry./%",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_71_0": "* ..^1.我注意到这里有个谜题。/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_73_0": "* Yeah?/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_75_0": "* Would you two..^1. like to..^1. do it...?/",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_77_0": "* Uh, no. That's for heroes./",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_78_0": "* We're bad guys.\n* We don't have to do anything./",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_80_0": "* Except scheme./",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_82_0": "* Yeah. Except scheme./",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0": "* So have fun, we'll be here./%",
  "obj_suitspuzzle_event_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0": "* Just do the puzzle, 克里斯./%",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_22_0": "* Y..^1. You got past Thrash World!?/",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_23_0": "\\E7* Hng..^1. Even with your help, I couldn't stop you.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_25_0": "* Hey, it's alright, 兰瑟. It was a nice effort./",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_27_0": "* Yeah, I mean, you gotta be realistic./",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_28_0": "\\E2* Nothing can stop us. Not even ourselves./",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_29_0": "Guys",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_30_0": "The (Censored) Squad",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_31_0": "The 兰瑟 Fan Club",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_32_0": "The Friendly Fun Gang",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_34_0": "* That's right!!\n* The ~1!!/",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_35_0": "* You crush everything that gets in your way!/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_59_0": "* Hmmm..^1. What am I supposed to do, then.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_60_0": "\\E4* If I can't stop you, then.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_61_0": "\\E5* Then, my dad will.../%",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_77_0": "* .../",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_78_0": "* Well.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_79_0": "\\E2* Why don't you come with us.../",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_80_0": "\\E1* And maybe you'll think of how to stop us on the way./%",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_104_0": "* R..^1. Really!?\n* You'd let me tag along...!?/",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0": "* Sure, why not. You can be an unofficial team member./",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0": "* Wow! M..^1. Me!? In the ~1!?/",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_109_0": "\\E4* W..^1. Wait.../%",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_125_0": "* Can we have monogrammed track jackets?/",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_127_0": "* Yeah.\n* 利艾尔斯 will make them./",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_129_0": "* 嗯..^1. 啊 ？！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_130_0": "\\E8* ..^1.那好吧！/",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_132_0": "* Ahahah!!!\n* 兰瑟 joins the team!!!/%",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_144_0": "* 兰瑟加入了队伍！",
  "obj_thrashafter_event_slash_Step_0_gml_159_0": "* No./%",
  "obj_town_event_slash_Step_0_gml_120_0": "* （窗帘被拉上了...）/%",

  "obj_treasure_room_slash_Other_10_gml_24_0": "* （箱子里是空的。）\n* （嗯^1，除了一些带有薄荷香气的碎片。）/",
  "obj_treasure_room_slash_Other_10_gml_26_0": "* 请别吃那些东西^1，\n克里斯.../%",

  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_48_0": "..^1.好吧。",

  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_66_0": "粉色缎带",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_67_0": "一条可爱的粉色缎带\n能够提高擦弹获得TP的区域大小。",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_68_0": "不要^1。我又不是小学生。",

  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_79_0": "擦弹区域",

  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_110_0": "（啧^1，还挺酷的...）",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_111_0": "*叮叮当当* 哈哈！",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_128_0": "鼠币",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_129_0": "一枚金币^1，刻着某个曾经位高权重的\n老鼠巫师的头像。",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_130_0": "这家伙..^1. 有点眼熟？",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_131_0": "吱^1！治疗能力提高！",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_148_0": "小丑魔的尾巴",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_149_0": "一条J型的尾巴^1，能赐予你恶魔的能量。",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_150_0": "我打算哪天自己也长一条。",
  "scr_armorinfo_slash_scr_armorinfo_gml_151_0": "我可是个善良的恶魔^1，知道吗？",
  "scr_asgface_slash_scr_asgface_gml_1_0": "\\TX \\F0 \\E~1 \\FA \\TA %",
  "scr_asterskip_slash_scr_asterskip_gml_4_0": "||",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_83_0": "* 一个和上次不一样的方钻接近了！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_84_0": "* 估计是另一个不同的方钻出现了！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_223_0": "* 三头草和心桃更亲密了！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_292_0": "* 兰瑟拦住了去路！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_303_0": "* 拼图怪接近了！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_304_0": "* 一个和上次不一样的拼图怪接近了！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_305_0": "* 估计是另一个不同的拼图怪出现了！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_343_0": "* 自助盛宴。",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_358_0": "* 尘兔滑到了路中间！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_430_0": "* 心桃首领默默地拦住了去路！",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_449_0": "* 心桃首领默默地拦住了去路！（x3）",
  "scr_encountersetup_slash_scr_encountersetup_gml_484_0": "* 尘兔们滑到了路中间！",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_69_0": "普通",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_98_0": "克里斯",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_99_0": "苏西",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_100_0": "利艾尔斯",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_206_0": "G躯体",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_325_0": "是",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_326_0": "否",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_327_0": "有可能",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_328_0": "不知道",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_343_0": "家",
  "scr_gamestart_slash_scr_gamestart_gml_345_0": "克里斯",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_11_0": "回复40HP^1。一颗红黑相间的星星，\n口感像棉花糖。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_14_0": "使倒下的同伴HP回复至全满。\n一颗薄荷味的绿色水晶。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_17_0": "闪烁着点点微光的碎片。\n用途不明。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_20_0": "一本由利艾尔斯手工制作的\n写有各种技巧与诀窍的书。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_23_0": "尽管它残缺不全^1，却翻腾着力量。\n一位工匠大师可以修好它。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_26_0": "好吃到能让你舌头旋转打结的蛋糕！\n回复全员160HP。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_29_0": "陀螺形状的糕点。\n回复全员80HP。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_32_0": "神秘的黑色汉堡^1，原材料是...\n等等^1，这只是烤焦了而已！ +70HP",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_35_0": "一块形如兰瑟脸的饼干。\n也许并不是饼干^1。回复5HP？",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_38_0": "份量巨大的沙拉..^1. 不过只放了生菜，\n所以一文不值。 +4HP",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_41_0": "能够一分为三的三明治。\n回复全员30HP。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_44_0": "这可是心哦！？\n里头填满了凝结成块的红色果酱。 +??HP",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_47_0": "非常小^1，但有些人很喜欢它。\n+??HP",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_50_0": "味道完美无瑕。\n回复500HP。",
  "scr_itemdesc_slash_scr_itemdesc_gml_53_0": "散发着美味香气的黑色油面酱。\n而且..^1. 掺有蠕虫。+50HP",
  "scr_itemdesc_b_slash_scr_itemdesc_b_gml_11_0": "回复\n60HP",
  "scr_itemdesc_b_slash_scr_itemdesc_b_gml_14_0": "复活\n同伴\n（效果弱）",
  "scr_itemdesc_oldtype_slash_scr_itemdesc_oldtype_gml_2_0": "* 不可能。/%",
  "scr_itemdesc_oldtype_slash_scr_itemdesc_oldtype_gml_6_0": "* 一股虚无填满了你的双手。/%",
  "scr_itemdesc_oldtype_slash_scr_itemdesc_oldtype_gml_9_0": "* “黑暗糖果” - 回复60HP\n* 棉花糖口味的红黑色星星。/%",
  "scr_itemdesc_oldtype_slash_scr_itemdesc_oldtype_gml_12_0": "* “生命露水” - 复活队友（效果弱）\n* 闪闪发光的露水...\n* 能够滋润你的【灵魂】。/%",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_14_0": "黑暗糖果",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_15_0": "回复\n40HP",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_21_0": "复活薄荷",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_22_0": "治疗\n倒下的\n同伴",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_28_0": "发光碎片",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_29_0": "去商店\n卖掉",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_35_0": "手册",
  "scr_iteminfo_slash_scr_iteminfo_gml_36_0": "在战斗外\n阅读",

  "scr_spellinfo_slash_scr_spellinfo_gml_89_0": "可以做各种各样的事。\n这不是魔法。",
  "scr_talkroom_slash_scr_talkroom_gml_4_0": "* 你的声音盲目地回响着。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2193_0": "\n冲水",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2194_0": "\n不冲",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_11_0": "* 你真的不想把它丢掉。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_12_0": "* 无论如何都要丢掉它吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2979_0": "\\C2",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_19_0": "* 你感觉松了一口气。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_23_0": "* 你颤抖着手^1，把垃圾球扔到地上。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_24_0": "* 它摔成了碎片。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_25_0": "* 你感到一阵苦楚。/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_411_0": " \\C2",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_193_0": " 我来当\n你的臣民",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_194_0": "有梦就好",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_197_0": "* 这里是城堡小镇^2，\n我的臣民居住的地方.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_198_0": "\\E1* 呃^1，好吧^1，\n前提是我有臣民的话.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_199_0": "\\E8* 噢^1，别担心我^1，克里斯！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_200_0": "\\E0* 我确信早晚有一天\n会找到臣民的.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_417_0": " \\C2",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_210_0": "\\E3* 呃..^1. 啊！？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_211_0": "\\E7* Why, 克里斯, you don't have to do that.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_212_0": "\\E1* ..^1.但是^1，如果你坚持的话.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_213_0": "\\E0* 克里斯^1，以我王子的权力^1，\n我命令你...！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_214_0": "\\E8* 请你告诉我^1，我该怎么做！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_221_0": "* Oh, thank you, 克里斯^2!\n* I will!/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_457_0": " \\C2",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2202_0": " \\C2",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2223_0": "\n弹一弹",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2224_0": "\n不弹",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3098_0": "\\C4 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2965_0": "\n回去",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2636_0": "\n不睡",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_774_0": "\\M0* 嗨..^1. 你好... \n* 我看到你... \n* 一直站在这里.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_775_0": "\\M1* 是我！\n* 你认识我^1，对吧？\n* 你当然认识！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_776_0": "\\M0* 我可受欢迎了！\n* 我只是！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_777_0": "\\M3* 一个朋友也没有.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_778_0": "\\M1* 但这没关系^1，你听到没！\n* 因为你来了！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_779_0": "\\M0* 你愿意做我的朋友吗？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2714_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_786_0": "\n克里斯",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_787_0": "\n叫马不是马\n有张大嘴巴",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_794_0": "\\M4* 噢^1！噢！\n* 我好开心^1，你听到没！？\n* 我好开心我..^1. 我.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_795_0": "\\M3* 我都不知道该做什么了！\n* 我以前从没这么开心过！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_796_0": "\\M2* 朋友^1，你叫什么名字？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2751_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_809_0": "\n洋葱",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_810_0": "\n美人",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_811_0": "艾斯利尔二世",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_812_0": "恶心",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_817_0": "\\M0* 原来你叫克里斯！\n* 真是个适合你这个朋友的好名字！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_822_0": "\\M0* 叫..^1. 叫妈..^1. 叫麻..^1. 叫骂... \n* 唔^1，叫马不是马有张大嘴巴^1！成了！\n* 虽然名字很长^1，但也值得一记！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_825_0": "\\M1* 噢^1，不好意思！\n* 我忘记自我介绍了！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1174_0": "\\M1* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_827_0": "\\M3* ..^1.其实^1，因为没人和我讲话^1，\n我把自己的名字忘了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_828_0": "克里斯",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_829_0": "叫马不是马有张大嘴巴",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_830_0": "\\M1* ~1！\n* 你能给我起个名字吗...？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_840_0": "\\M0* 嗯^1！那太完美了^1，你听到没！\n* 我不知道那是什么意思^1，\n但它很完美！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_841_0": "\\M4* 嗯！！\n* 似乎它形状像我！\n* 似乎闻起来也像我！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_842_0": "\\M2* 等等^1，那名字叫什么来着？\n* 羊..^1. 羊松^1？没错^1！太完美了！\n* 我的名字就叫^1，羊松。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_848_0": "\\M0* 哇... \n* 这名字太棒了！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_849_0": "\\M4* 感觉我的自尊心正在绽放^1！\n感觉我的脑袋就要开满鲜花！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_850_0": "\\M2* 等等^1，那名字叫什么来着？\n* 美..^1. 美楞^1？没错^1！太完美了！\n* 那味道^1，那气味^1，那.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_857_0": "\\M2* 艾斯利尔二世..^1. 唔... \n* 听上去..^1. 好耳熟。\n* 那是..^1. 回忆的感觉！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_858_0": "\\M4* 听上去像是那个善良的男孩...\n* 他给我喂过好吃的梨子。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_859_0": "\\M2* 等等^1，他名字叫什么来着？\n* 爱吃..^1. 爱吃梨儿^1？没错^1！我爱吃梨！\n* 让我浸泡在梨子里吧！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_869_0": "\\M0* 谢谢你给我起名字！\n* 我会好好珍惜的^1，你听到没！？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_870_0": "\\M0* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_871_0": "\\M2* 巧..^1. 巧克里斯？\n* 我没记错你的名字吧？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_872_0": "\\M3* 唔^1，叫..^1. 叫麻..^1. 呃... \n* 叫嘛不是嘛有种打嘴巴。\n* 我没记错你的名字吧？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_873_0": "\\M1* 我明天..^1. 想告诉你..^1. \n一件事.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_874_0": "\\M5* 那是我只能对朋友说的事情.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_875_0": "\\M5* 记得回来啊^1，你听到没.../%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3033_0": "\\E0* 克里斯^1，亲爱的^1，\n你已经长这么大了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3034_0": "\\E9* 过不了多久你也要去\n上大学了.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3067_0": "\\E1* .../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3036_0": "\\E9* 还记不记得你小时候.../",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3037_0": "\\E8* 问我们你什么时候才会长角？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3038_0": "\\E0* 于是我们去买了个\n带着一对小红角的发箍。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3039_0": "\\E4* 哈^1，你戴了好几个月^1！\n它后来哪去了？/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1572_0": "\\E2* 克里斯, I need to grade these assignments./",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1573_0": "\\E0* Perhaps you should go to bed...?/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1574_0": "\\E1* You do not look very well.../%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2785_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2795_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3167_0": "\n不拿",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2845_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2177_0": "* （香味马克笔。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3088_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2184_0": "* （你把棉花糖味的那支挖出来\n并朝着笔尖哈气。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2188_0": "* （反正那支巧克力味的闻起来太假了。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2776_0": "* 请勿逗留！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2780_0": " \nBlaze",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2781_0": " \nDo Not Blaze",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2784_0": "* 烧掉它。/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3143_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3178_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2933_0": "\n乘坐",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2658_0": "\n不睡",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2937_0": "* （要乘坐电梯吗？）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3010_0": "\\C2",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3137_0": "\n给蛋糕",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2934_0": "\n不乘坐",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3141_0": "* 嘛噶里叭！\n* 那个蛋糕！\n* 它里面翻腾着力量！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3142_0": "* 这是我的蛋糕^1，对不对！？\n* 你把它修好了！？\n* 你能还给我吗！？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3207_0": "\\C2 ",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3151_0": "* 俺哒妈咩^1！我的旧蛋糕^1！\n我高兴得都快要转起来了！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3152_0": "* 我的朋友们^1，来分享我的财富吧^1！\n我还存着很多不那么好的蛋糕^1，\n都不想要了！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3153_0": "* 如果你身上没有蛋糕^1，就来我这里^1！\n我会送你一个^1，多少次都行！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3155_0": "\\S0* （你用顶尖蛋糕交换了旋转蛋糕。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3156_0": "* 现在^1，我要继续旋转着喜极而泣了^1！\n边转边落泪！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3161_0": "* 蛋糕甜美^1，然性格非也^1！悲剧啊！！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3166_0": "\n拿蛋糕",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3202_0": "\n拒绝",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3173_0": "* 妈妈咪叭^1！你喜欢我的淘汰甜品吗？/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3177_0": "* 麦啊咪勾^1！你想要一份次品蛋糕吗^1，\n我的朋友？/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3186_0": "* 请拿着这个蛋糕^1！\n它一文不值^1，我亲爱的朋友！/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3188_0": "\\S0* （你获得了旋转蛋糕。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3191_0": "* 妈妈西叭^1！你身上太多\n不是蛋糕的东西了！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3196_0": "* 我知道^1！\n太多蛋糕会让你边转边落泪！！/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3201_0": "\n收下",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3205_0": "* （唔^1，这里有一个男人。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3206_0": "* （他把什么东西递给了你。）/",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3214_0": "* （你得到了一颗蛋。）/%",
  "scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3220_0": "* （于是他不必久留了。）/%",
  "scr_torface_slash_scr_torface_gml_1_0": "\\TX \\F0 \\E~1 \\FT \\TT %",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_29_0": "木剑",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_30_0": "一把有着碳强化核心的\n练习用木剑。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_31_0": "这什么！^1？筷子吗？",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_34_0": "..^1.你有把剑！？",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_36_0": "那是你用的^1，克里斯...",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_54_0": "鬃斧",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_55_0": "由幼龙鬃毛铸造而成，\n初学者使用的斧头。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_56_0": "这配不上我。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_57_0": "呃..^1. 有点太大了。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_75_0": "红围巾",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_76_0": "使用轻质魔法纤维\n制造的普通围巾。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_77_0": "不^1，这个..^1. 没门。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_78_0": "好舒服^1！克里斯^1，你摸摸看！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_97_0": "大家武器",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_98_0": "大家都能使用的武器。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_99_0": "呃..^1. 好吧。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_100_0": "很趁手！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_119_0": "橙黑相间的剑，\n有着蝙蝠形状的柄。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_120_0": "啧^1，太小了！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_121_0": "噢^1，好可怕！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_134_0": "骇人度提升",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_160_0": "恶魔飞刀",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_161_0": "装饰着骷髅的斧镰。\n减少粗暴碎击10点TP消耗",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_162_0": "让游戏开始吧！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_163_0": "这也太^1，呃^1，邪恶了。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_176_0": "碎击TP消耗减少",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_181_0": "Trefoil",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_182_0": "覆满苔藓的刺剑^1，饰有三叶草纹章。\n将$的获得量提高5%。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_183_0": "什么破玩意儿^1？不要！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_184_0": "跟我的绿色不太搭...",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_197_0": "金钱获取量提升",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_202_0": "劈巾",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_203_0": "一条结实的围巾\n如同匕首一般劈开敌人的身体。",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_204_0": "好疼^1！这一点都不舒服！",
  "scr_weaponinfo_slash_scr_weaponinfo_gml_205_0": "感觉有点扎人..^1. 真漂亮！",

  "scr_windowcaption_slash_scr_windowcaption_gml_1_0": "DELTARUNE",
  "obj_darkdoor_slash_Step_0_gml_300_0": "\\E0* ..^1.克里斯？/%",

  "obj_npc_facing_slash_Other_10_gml_257_0": "* ?/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_876_0": "* 妈妈咪叭！^1！\n何等欢庆^1！必须做蛋糕！！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_877_0": "* 而且这一次^1，我要用金属来做^1，\n这样就不会被动物给吃掉了！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_880_0": "* 三头草的妈妈！\n* 欢迎随时品尝我的蛋糕！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_882_0": "* 我必须是三头草的妈妈\n才能尝吗？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_884_0": "* 没错^1！我的规矩就是那么任性！/%",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_888_0": "* 妈妈咪叭！^1！\n何等欢庆^1！大家都来了！！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_889_0": "* 想必我做的那块蛋糕就是\n用在这次生日派对上的！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_890_0": "* 三头草的生日^1！\n多么美妙的时机^1！\n我要感动得哭了！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_892_0": "* 呃..^1. 实际上^1，这整件事都是^1，\n那个^1，我们的错。/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_894_0": "* 噢^1！麦啊咪勾^1！所以..^1. \n您是三头草的母亲！？！？？/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_895_0": "* 现在我明白你为什么吃掉\n蛋糕了！^1！为了保护她！！/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_897_0": "* 啥^1，等等^1，不是^1，我--/",
  "obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_898_0": "\\E3* （等等^1，我要是就这么承认了^1，\n是不是能拿到更多蛋糕...？）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_113_0": "* 冰箱上有一张照片^1。\n里面是你^1，你的妈妈^1，还有你的哥哥。/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_519_0": "* （只是一个普通的洞...）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_530_0": "* （绕着中间转^1，仔细观察。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_531_0": "* （周围越黑^1，你能看见的就越多。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_541_0": "* （仔细一看^1，有个开关在树上...！）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_545_0": "* （仔细一看^1，有个开关在树上...！）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1011_0": "* （一把椅子。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1017_0": "* （这是一张图表^1，\n上面画着一个圆和许多线段。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1024_0": "* （这是一个普通的洗手池。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1027_0": "* （这是另一个洗手池的克隆体。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1028_0": "* （也许曾经有一个很高的洗手池被从中间\n切成了两半^1，从而创造出它们两个。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1041_0": "* （你往橱柜里面看了看。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1042_0": "* （..^1.里面放着一架非常小的\n公用钢琴。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1046_0": "* （这是一张经典的疼痛等级表^1，\n以ICE-E为例来表示10个等级。）/",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1047_0": "* （疼痛度为0时^1，他很快乐。）\n* （疼痛度为10时^1，他很快乐^1，\n并且流着汗。）/%",
  "obj_readable_room1_slash_Other_10_gml_1051_0": "* 这座城堡的白魔法师们\n将我发配到这间治疗室.../",
